H2KG Ontology

PEMFC Reference

EMMO-aligned ontology for hydrogen electrochemical systems, experiments, materials, measurements, and FAIR metadata

Ontology release

Developed through DECODE, the Helmholtz Metadata Collaboration (HMC), and AIMWORKS to support FAIR ontology publication and reusable metadata infrastructure for hydrogen electrochemical systems.

DECODEHMCAIMWORKS
Home User Guide Overview Reference Architecture Classes Properties Alignments Examples Import Import Catalog Quality Developer Release

H2KG PEMFC Profile

Proton exchange membrane fuel cell profile for experiments, materials, processes, and measurements

Ontology IRI: https://w3id.org/h2kg/pemfc/hydrogen-ontology

Namespace: https://w3id.org/h2kg/pemfc/hydrogen-ontology#

Rendered terms: 2146

Release Quality

Profile Reference Scope

This page presents the H2KG PEMFC Profile as a structured reference, grouping all profile-visible terms into navigable sections instead of one flat list. It is the intended future human-readable landing page for the H2KG PEMFC Profile namespace.

ODK shadow-mode status: ODK shadow artefacts are technically aligned and show no IRI drift, but shadow mode remains the active governance state until promotion is explicitly approved.

HDO-reviewed terms in the current run: 96

Full H2KG namespace

  • Object Properties (18)
  • Datatype Properties (1)
  • Measurements (196)
  • Instruments (187)
  • Materials (464)
  • Parameters (551)
  • Properties (525)
  • Manufacturing / Processes (133)
  • Data / Metadata (52)
  • Normalization Bases (6)

Classes

13 terms

Agent

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#Agent
Type
Class

A class representing an agent that is responsible for carrying out a process, producing data, or contributing to the provenance of a resource in H2KG.

subclassOf / subPropertyOf
http://www.w3.org/ns/prov#Agent

Mappings

  • rdfs:subClassOf http://www.w3.org/ns/prov#Agent (Agent)

Data

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#Data
Type
Class

A class representing data produced, used, or referenced by a process or measurement in H2KG.

subclassOf / subPropertyOf
http://www.w3.org/ns/prov#Entity

Data Point

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#DataPoint
Type
Class

A class representing a single data point that links a value to the property and measurement context it belongs to in H2KG.

subclassOf / subPropertyOf
http://www.w3.org/ns/prov#Entity

Instrument

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#Instrument
Type
Class

A class representing an instrument used to perform, support, or control a measurement or manufacturing process in H2KG.

subclassOf / subPropertyOf
http://www.w3.org/ns/prov#Entity

Manufacturing

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#Manufacturing
Type
Class

subclassOf / subPropertyOf
Process

Matter

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#Matter
Type
Class

A class representing a material entity that participates in a process, measurement, or device configuration in H2KG.

Measurement

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#Measurement
Type
Class

A class representing a measurement process that determines one or more properties of a material, device, or system in H2KG.

subclassOf / subPropertyOf
Process

Class

Class, Parameter

Parameter

Class

Process

Class

subclasses

Class

Measurements

196 terms

Acid Base Titration Measurement

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#AcidBaseTitrationMeasurement
Type
Measurement
altLabel
acid-base titration

Acid-base titration used to determine phosphoric-acid doping level (ADL).

Acid Uptake Measurement

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#AcidUptakeMeasurement
Type
Measurement
altLabel
PA uptake measurement

Measurement of phosphoric acid uptake and acid doping level (ADL) by mass difference.

Adhesion Tape Test Measurement

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#AdhesionTapeTestMeasurement
Type
Measurement
altLabel
tape peel test

Qualitative adhesion evaluation of Cu patterns on PET via adhesive tape test.

Analytical Centrifuge Sedimentation Measurement

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#AnalyticalCentrifugeSedimentationMeasurement
Type
Measurement
altLabel
analytical centrifuge

Accelerated sedimentation/stability characterization using analytical centrifuge (AC); not present as named Measurement in ontology.

Apparatus Specification Measurement

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ApparatusSpecificationMeasurement
Type
Measurement

Capture reported equipment specifications (e.g., positioning accuracy).

Archimedes Density Measurement

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ArchimedesDensityMeasurement
Type
Measurement

Bulk density measurement of printed, pyrolyzed parts by Archimedes method.

Atomic Force Microscopy Measurement

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#AtomicForceMicroscopyMeasurement
Type
Measurement
altLabel
AFM; atomic force microscopy

In-situ atomic force microscopy imaging of PFSI adsorbed structures on Pt(111) in various water/n-propanol mixtures.

ATRFTIR Measurement

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ATRFTIRMeasurement
Type
Measurement
altLabel
ATR–FTIR; FTIR

ATR–FTIR measurement to assess ester cross-link stability over acid exposure time.

Capillary Pressure Estimation

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CapillaryPressureEstimation
Type
Measurement
altLabel
capillary pressure derivation

proposed_new_term. paper_context: Procedure to infer membrane capillary pressure from operando crack saturation and ex situ saturation–pressure relation.

Carbon Black Aggregate Structure Simulation

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CarbonBlackAggregateStructureSimulation
Type
Measurement
altLabel
CB aggregate structure simulation

Simulation step that reconstructs 3D carbon black aggregate morphology using probability-density placement and surface roughness fitting (validated vs size/SSA/pore volume).

Carbon Monoxide Displacement Chronoamperometry

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CarbonMonoxideDisplacementChronoamperometry
Type
Measurement
altLabel
CO displacement chronoamperometry

CO displacement transient (I–t) to quantify displacement charge; used to infer sulfonate coverage / adsorbed species at set potentials.

Carbon Monoxide Stripping Voltammetry

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CarbonMonoxideStrippingVoltammetry
Type
Measurement
altLabel
carbon monoxide stripping; CO voltammetry stripping; CO-stripping voltammogram

CO stripping voltammetry measurement to quantify ECSA at different RH levels.

Catalyst Layer Acid Loading Determination

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CatalystLayerAcidLoadingDetermination
Type
Measurement

CL H3PO4 loading estimated from mass difference before/after doping; not found in ontology.

Catalyst Layer Composition Specification

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CatalystLayerCompositionSpecification
Type
Measurement
altLabel
CL composition specification

Specification of catalyst-layer composition parameters used in calculations (e.g., ionomer volume fraction).

Catalyst Layer Microstructure Simulation

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CatalystLayerMicrostructureSimulation
Type
Measurement
altLabel
catalyst layer simulation

Simulation that packs reconstructed CB aggregates into a 3D catalyst layer, applies ionomer coating model, and computes ionomer connectivity/tortuosity and relative proton conductivity.

Catalyst Layer Thickness Measurement

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CatalystLayerThicknessMeasurement
Type
Measurement
altLabel
catalyst layer thickness; cathode catalyst layer thickness; thickness measurement (ImageJ from SEM cross-sections)

Measurement/reporting of catalyst layer thickness as a function of Pt loading.

Catalyst Loading Determination

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CatalystLoadingDetermination
Type
Measurement
altLabel
Pt loading determination; catalyst loading measured by XRF; catalyst loading measurement

Determination of Pt loading (mg_Pt/cm2) by weighing and Pt wt% of catalyst.

Cathodic Stripping Voltammetry

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CathodicStrippingVoltammetry
Type
Measurement

A measurement process that uses cathodic stripping voltammetry to determine Cathodic Stripping Peak Current and Peak Potential using Electrochemical Workstation and generating Experiment Dataset.

Chronoamperometry Measurement

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ChronoamperometryMeasurement
Type
Measurement
altLabel
chronoamperometric measurement; chronoamperometry (I–t); continuous voltage chronoamperometry

Constant-potential current-time measurement used here for ORR durability (e.g., at 0.55 V vs RHE for 30000 s) and methanol tolerance.

Chronopotentiometry Measurement

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ChronopotentiometryMeasurement
Type
Measurement

A measurement process that applies constant current to determine cell voltage and cell-voltage increase rate over time.

Coating Mass Measurement

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CoatingMassMeasurement
Type
Measurement
altLabel
dispensed mass measurement

Weighing Kapton support before/after coating to obtain deposited mass.

Coating Weight Measurement

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CoatingWeightMeasurement
Type
Measurement
altLabel
catalyst coating weight; coating weight

Gravimetric measurement of catalyst coating mass/weight on CCM.

Cold Start Test

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ColdStartTest
Type
Measurement
altLabel
isothermal cold start; cold start process

Sub-zero start-up test procedure with voltage-time response under constant current density.

Compressive Strength Measurement

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CompressiveStrengthMeasurement
Type
Measurement
altLabel
compressive strength test; compressive stress-strain

Mechanical testing under compression to determine compressive strength of printed lattices.

Contact Angle Measurement

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ContactAngleMeasurement
Type
Measurement
altLabel
contact angle test; contact angle; water drop contact angle measurement

Sessile drop contact angle measurement on CCM surface.

Contrast Variation SANSUSANS Measurement

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ContrastVariationSANSUSANSMeasurement
Type
Measurement
altLabel
contrast-variation neutron scattering; SANS; USANS

Combined contrast-variation small-angle and ultrasmall-angle neutron scattering (SANS+USANS) used to quantify hierarchical ink structure.

Crack Characterization Measurement

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CrackCharacterizationMeasurement
Type
Measurement
altLabel
crack characterization

A measurement process that uses crack characterization measurement to determine Crack Density and Crack Aspect Ratio using SEM Instrument.

Crack Connectivity Analysis

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CrackConnectivityAnalysis
Type
Measurement
altLabel
cluster connectivity analysis

proposed_new_term. paper_context: Analysis quantifying fraction of cracks fully penetrating the catalyst layer (connectivity metric).

Critical Crack Thickness Measurement

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CriticalCrackThicknessMeasurement
Type
Measurement
altLabel
CCT measurement; critical crack thickness

Determination of maximum film thickness without primary cracks during drying; assessed by confocal microscopy across thickness series.

Crush Strength Measurement

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CrushStrengthMeasurement
Type
Measurement
altLabel
crush strength testing; radial crush strength

Radial crush strength measurement of cylindrical ceramic specimens.

Current-Interrupt HFR Measurement

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CurrentInterruptHFRMeasurement
Type
Measurement
altLabel
current interrupt; HFR measurement; high frequency resistance (HFR) measurement

A measurement process that uses Current-Interrupt HFR measurement to determine Ohmic Resistance and High Frequency Resistance using Fuel Cell Test Station and Milli Ohmmeter and generating Experiment Dataset.

Cyclic Bending Test Measurement

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CyclicBendingTestMeasurement
Type
Measurement
altLabel
cyclic bending test; bending durability test

Mechanical cycling test where Cu patterns on PET are bent repeatedly and normalized resistance is tracked.

Cyclic Voltammetry

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CyclicVoltammetry
Type
Measurement
altLabel
CV; cyclic voltammograms; cyclic voltammogram

A measurement process that uses cyclic voltammetry to determine Double Layer Capacitance, Electrochemically Active Surface Area, and Onset Potential using Electrochemical Workstation, Potentiostat, and Fuel Cell Test Station and generating Experiment Dataset, ECSA Dataset, and Cyclic Voltammogram Dataset.

Decal Transfer Evaluation Measurement

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#DecalTransferEvaluationMeasurement
Type
Measurement
altLabel
Pt loading measured by weighing

Measurement workflow calculating Pt loading and catalyst transfer yield from decal film mass change during release.

Deflection Criterion Calculation

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#DeflectionCriterionCalculation
Type
Measurement
altLabel
Eq. (1)-(3) calculation

Analytical estimation of filament midspan deflection and required storage modulus based on literature equations.

Degradation Prediction Evaluation Measurement

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#DegradationPredictionEvaluationMeasurement
Type
Measurement
altLabel
degradation prediction; prediction performance evaluation

Evaluation of data-driven degradation prediction models against measured aging datasets.

Density Functional Theory Calculation

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#DensityFunctionalTheoryCalculation
Type
Measurement
altLabel
DFT; density functional theory

Computational calculation (DFT) used to obtain adsorption/binding energies.

Density Measurement

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#DensityMeasurement
Type
Measurement
altLabel
Density

Generic density measurement for ink/mixture (method not specified in this source).

Differential Scanning Calorimetry Measurement

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#DifferentialScanningCalorimetryMeasurement
Type
Measurement
altLabel
DSC; differential scanning calorimetry

A measurement process used to determine thermal event peak temperature and phase transition temperature by differential scanning calorimetry, typically using a differential scanning calorimeter, DSC instrument, or synchronous thermal analyzer, and generating a thermal analysis dataset.

Discrete Element Method Packing Simulation

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#DiscreteElementMethodPackingSimulation
Type
Measurement
altLabel
discrete element method; DEM; DEM simulation

Computational reconstruction of CL geometry by DEM packing of multisphere carbon agglomerates during ink drying.

Distribution Of Relaxation Times Analysis

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#DistributionOfRelaxationTimesAnalysis
Type
Measurement
altLabel
DRT; distribution of relaxation times

Computational analysis that deconvolves an impedance spectrum into a distribution of relaxation times (DRT) to identify process peaks.

Dry Reforming Of Methane Performance Measurement

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#DryReformingOfMethanePerformanceMeasurement
Type
Measurement

Fixed-bed dry reforming of methane (DRM) catalytic performance test (conversions, etc.).

Dynamic Light Scattering Measurement

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#DynamicLightScatteringMeasurement
Type
Measurement
altLabel
dynamic light scattering; DLS; dynamic scattered-light intensity analysis

Measurement of hydrodynamic radius/agglomerate size distribution in ink/solution.

Dynamic Vapor Sorption Measurement

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#DynamicVaporSorptionMeasurement
Type
Measurement
altLabel
DVS; dynamic vapor sorption

Gravimetric water sorption/desorption measurement used for water uptake in CL/membranes (mentioned in Section 6.2.3), but not present as a specific term in ontology.

ECSA by Double-Layer Capacitance

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ECSAByDoubleLayerCapacitance
Type
Measurement

A measurement process that determines electrochemically active surface area from double-layer capacitance measurements using an electrochemical workstation and generating an experiment dataset.

Electrical Resistivity Measurement

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ElectricalResistivityMeasurement
Type
Measurement

Electrical resistivity (or resistance-derived resistivity) measurement of electroless Cu patterns on PET.

Electrochemical Impedance Spectroscopy Galvanostatic

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ElectrochemicalImpedanceSpectroscopyGalvanostatic
Type
Measurement
altLabel
impedance spectra; EIS; galvanostatic impedance spectroscopy

A measurement process that uses electrochemical impedance spectroscopy galvanostatic to determine Charge Transfer Resistance, Double Layer Capacitance, and Ohmic Resistance using Electrochemical Workstation, Potentiostat, and Fuel Cell Test Station and generating Experiment Dataset, Impedance Dataset, and EIS Nyquist Dataset.

Electrochemical Impedance Spectroscopy Potentiostatic

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ElectrochemicalImpedanceSpectroscopyPotentiostatic
Type
Measurement
altLabel
EIS; impedance spectroscopy; electrochemical impedance spectroscopy

A measurement process that uses electrochemical impedance spectroscopy potentiostatic to determine Charge Transfer Resistance, Double Layer Capacitance, and Ohmic Resistance using Electrochemical Workstation, Potentiostat, and Segmented Cell System and generating Experiment Dataset, Impedance Dataset, and EIS Nyquist Dataset.

Electrochemical Reaction Simulation

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ElectrochemicalReactionSimulation
Type
Measurement
altLabel
mass transfer simulation

3D electrochemical reaction + mass/charge transfer simulation on reconstructed geometry using upscaled transport properties.

Electron Microscopy Imaging

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ElectronMicroscopyImaging
Type
Measurement
altLabel
electron microscopy; FIB-SEM cross section imaging; FESEM imaging

Electron microscopy imaging used to observe Pt nanoparticle size, agglomerates, and ionomer films.

Electron Spin Resonance Spectroscopy Measurement

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ElectronSpinResonanceSpectroscopyMeasurement
Type
Measurement

ESR spectroscopy used to detect reactive oxygen species (•OH, •O2−) via spin-trap (DMPO).

Electron Tomography Imaging

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ElectronTomographyImaging
Type
Measurement
altLabel
electron tomography

Electron tomography (tilt-series + reconstruction) used to compute 3D volume and accessible surface area of catalyst networks.

Energy Dispersive X Ray Spectroscopy

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#EnergyDispersiveXRaySpectroscopy
Type
Measurement
altLabel
EDX; energy dispersive spectrometry; energy dispersive spectrometry (EDS)

EDX in STEM mode used to quantify Pt and Ru atomic percentages and Pt/Ru ratio in particles/networks.

Epoxy Equivalent Titration Measurement

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#EpoxyEquivalentTitrationMeasurement
Type
Measurement
altLabel
titration of epoxy equivalent

Titration method used to determine epoxy equivalent / oxirane content in epoxidized oils (Section 2.2.6).

Ex Situ Hydration Test

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ExSituHydrationTest
Type
Measurement
altLabel
hydration test; ex-situ hydration

A measurement process that uses ex situ hydration test to determine Water Uptake Ratio, Electronic Conductivity Loss Percent, and Swelling Fraction.

External Quantum Efficiency Measurement

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ExternalQuantumEfficiencyMeasurement
Type
Measurement
altLabel
EQE measurement; external quantum efficiency spectra

Spectral EQE measurement versus wavelength.

F 19 NMR Mobility Measurement

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#F19NMRMobilityMeasurement
Type
Measurement
altLabel
fluorine-19 NMR mobility measurement

Quantifies Nafion main-chain and side-chain mobility in solvent dispersions using 19F NMR peak analysis.

Fabrication Design Specification

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#FabricationDesignSpecification
Type
Measurement
altLabel
design specification

A measurement process that uses fabrication design specification to determine Anode Catalyst Loading, Cell Active Area, and Segment Active Area.

Fenton Oxidative Stability Measurement

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#FentonOxidativeStabilityMeasurement
Type
Measurement

Oxidative stability test by immersing in Fenton reagent and measuring residual weight.

FIBSEM Tomography Measurement

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#FIBSEMTomographyMeasurement
Type
Measurement
altLabel
FIB-SEM tomography; FIB-SEM

A measurement process that uses FIBSEM tomography measurement to determine Pore Size Distribution, Average Pore Size, and Large Pore Fraction Above 150 nm using SEM Instrument.

Film Thickness Measurement

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#FilmThicknessMeasurement
Type
Measurement
altLabel
printed film thickness; film thickness measurement (HRTEM)

Thickness measurement of printed ink film on polypropylene substrate using micrometer (Section 2.4.1.1).

Measurement

Measurement

Measurement

constant current charge/discharge; galvanic charge/discharge; charge/discharge cycling

Measurement

Measurement

Measurement

Measurement

Measurement
altLabel

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#OxygenGainLossMeasurement

Measurement

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SolventPhysicalPropertyCompilation
Type
Measurement
altLabel
solvent properties; solvent property calculation/compilation; Table 1 solvent properties

A measurement process that uses solvent physical property compilation to determine Boiling Point, Dielectric Constant, and Hansen Solubility Parameter Dispersion using Rheometer and generating Solvent Physical Property Dataset.

Solvent Property Lookup

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SolventPropertyLookup
Type
Measurement
altLabel
solvent property; calculated solvent properties; solubility parameter lookup

Represents solvent property values stated in text (not measured here)

Solvent Property Measurement

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SolventPropertyMeasurement
Type
Measurement
altLabel
solvent physicochemical properties; surface tension measurement; properties of solvents

A measurement process that uses solvent property measurement to determine Dielectric Constant, Boiling Point, and Viscosity using Ubbelohde Viscometer, Tensiometer, and Contact Angle Goniometer and generating Solvent Physical Property Dataset.

Spectroscopic Ellipsometry Measurement

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SpectroscopicEllipsometryMeasurement
Type
Measurement
altLabel
swelling measurement; thickness measurement; spectroscopic ellipsometry

Spectroscopic ellipsometry used to measure film thickness and swelling fraction vs RH.

Spray Coating Parameter Specification

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SprayCoatingParameterSpecification
Type
Measurement
altLabel
spray-coating parameters

Specification of spray-coating operating parameters (flow rate, pressure, temperature, nozzle height, speed).

Square Wave Voltammetry

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SquareWaveVoltammetry
Type
Measurement

A measurement process that uses square wave voltammetry to determine Peak Current and Peak Potential using Electrochemical Workstation and generating Experiment Dataset.

Strain Gauge Sensing Measurement

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#StrainGaugeSensingMeasurement
Type
Measurement
altLabel
strain sensing; impedance-based strain measurement; strain sensor test

Measurement protocol where sensor impedance is monitored while applying cyclic mechanical strain (simulated physiological conditions).

Stylus Profilometry Measurement

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#StylusProfilometryMeasurement
Type
Measurement
altLabel
stylus profilometry; stylus profiler

Stylus profilometry used to reconstruct 3D thickness/roughness maps over full 5×5 cm coating (after corrections).

Surface Basicity Measurement

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SurfaceBasicityMeasurement
Type
Measurement
altLabel
surface acido-basicity measurement

A measurement process that determines changes in surface basicity from pH measurements after contact between a material and solution.

Surface Preparation Specification

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SurfacePreparationSpecification
Type
Measurement

Tabulated/specification-like numeric parameters describing Pt(111) substrate preparation and geometry (annealing T/time, dimensions).

Tafel Polarization Measurement

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#TafelPolarizationMeasurement
Type
Measurement
altLabel
Tafel polarization

Tafel polarization on symmetric dummy cell to extract exchange current density and limiting current density.

Tafel Slope Step Analysis

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#TafelSlopeStepAnalysis
Type
Measurement
altLabel
Tafel step analysis; Tafel slope analysis; TS

Analysis of Tafel plot step to quantify CD loss linked to specific adsorption/connectivity.

Tensile Test Measurement

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#TensileTestMeasurement
Type
Measurement
altLabel
tensile test; INSTRON 3344 tensile test; Instron tensile test

Mechanical tensile testing to obtain tensile strength, elongation, and Young’s modulus.

Thermogravimetric Analysis Measurement

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ThermogravimetricAnalysisMeasurement
Type
Measurement
altLabel
thermogravimetric analysis

Thermogravimetric analysis used to quantify polymer grafting via mass loss.

Three D Laser Scanning Microscopy Measurement

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ThreeDLaserScanningMicroscopyMeasurement
Type
Measurement
altLabel
laser scanning microscopy

Confocal 3D laser scanning microscopy on ~0.25 cm² central region to measure surface topography.

Three Interval Thixotropy Test

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ThreeIntervalThixotropyTest
Type
Measurement
altLabel
thixotropy test; viscosity recovery test

Rheology protocol with low-strain, high-strain, then recovery steps used to quantify thixotropy/structure recovery.

Three Point Flexural Strength Measurement

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ThreePointFlexuralStrengthMeasurement
Type
Measurement
altLabel
three-point flexure

Three-point flexure test on pyrolyzed bars to obtain flexural strength.

Through Plane Electronic Conductivity Measurement

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ThroughPlaneElectronicConductivityMeasurement
Type
Measurement
altLabel
through-plane conductivity test; through-plane tests; electrical conductivity measurement

A measurement process that uses through plane electronic conductivity measurement to determine Through Plane Electronic Conductivity, Scaling Exponent T, and Electrical Percolation Threshold Volume Fraction using Micro Ohm Meter, Gold Plated Probes, and Pneumatic Jack and generating Conductivity Dataset.

Through Plane Thermal Conductivity Measurement

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ThroughPlaneThermalConductivityMeasurement
Type
Measurement
altLabel
thermal conductivity apparatus; ex-situ thermal conductivity

Description (paper-context): Ex-situ through-plane measurement of catalyst-layer thermal conductivity using a custom heat-flux/temperature-gradient rig (Fourier-law-based).

Through-Plane Gas Transport Measurement

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ThroughPlaneGasTransportMeasurement
Type
Measurement
altLabel
through-plane gas transport

A measurement process that uses Through-Plane gas transport measurement to determine Local Oxygen Transport Resistance, Effective Oxygen Diffusion Coefficient, and Mass Transport Resistance using Through-Plane Transport Cell and Environmental Chamber and generating Experiment Dataset.

Time Resolved Photoluminescence Measurement

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#TimeResolvedPhotoluminescenceMeasurement
Type
Measurement
altLabel
time-resolved PL decay; time-resolved PL

Time-resolved photoluminescence measurement used to compare decay lifetimes of composites.

Tortuosity Calculation

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#TortuosityCalculation
Type
Measurement
altLabel
geometric tortuosity calculation

A measurement process that uses tortuosity calculation to determine Catalyst Layer Tortuosity.

Transesterification Performance Measurement

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#TransesterificationPerformanceMeasurement
Type
Measurement

Assessment of catalytic performance for biodiesel production via soybean oil transesterification; quantified by GC-FID (EN14103).

Transmission Electron Microscopy Imaging

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#TransmissionElectronMicroscopyImaging
Type
Measurement
altLabel
TEM; transmission electron microscopy; TEM imaging

A measurement process that uses transmission electron microscopy imaging to determine Interplanar Spacing, Mean Particle Size, and Carbon Nanotube Outer Diameter using TEM Instrument and generating Microstructure Image Dataset.

Transmission Line Model Analysis

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#TransmissionLineModelAnalysis
Type
Measurement
altLabel
transmission line model

Analysis method to extract proton resistance and Cdl from impedance spectra.

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#UltraSmallAngleXRayScatteringMeasurement
Type
Measurement
altLabel
ultra-small-angle X-ray scattering; in-situ X-ray scattering; X-ray scattering

USAXS/SAXS scattering measurements on inks to quantify agglomeration/fractal dimension.

UV Visible Spectroscopy Measurement

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#UVVisibleSpectroscopyMeasurement
Type
Measurement
altLabel
UV–vis; UV spectra; UV-visible tests

UV–vis spectroscopy used to track monomer polymerization kinetics.

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#VisualInspectionStabilityMeasurement
Type
Measurement
altLabel
visual inspection

Qualitative stability test based on visually observed phase separation / settling time.

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#WaterContentMeasurement
Type
Measurement
altLabel
water content

A measurement process that uses water content measurement to determine Water Content Fraction and Water Uptake Indicator using Karl Fischer Titrator.

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#WaterStorageSpaceCalculation
Type
Measurement
altLabel
theoretical water storage calculation

A measurement process that uses water storage space calculation to determine Areal Water Storage Space.

Water Vapor Adsorption Measurement

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#WaterVaporAdsorptionMeasurement
Type
Measurement
altLabel
water vapor adsorption

Water vapor adsorption to estimate hydrophilicity and water uptake.

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#XRayComputedTomographyImaging
Type
Measurement
altLabel
X-ray computed tomography; X-ray CT; X-ray tomography

3D imaging measurement to quantify pore structure, porosity, and tortuosity in catalyst layers.

X Ray Computed Tomography Measurement

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#XRayComputedTomographyMeasurement
Type
Measurement
altLabel
x-ray computed tomography; X-ray tomography; X-ray CT

X-ray computed tomography imaging used to quantify fiber orientation angles and internal defects.

X Ray Diffraction Measurement

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#XRayDiffractionMeasurement
Type
Measurement
altLabel
XRD; X-ray diffraction; XRD measurement

XRD used to estimate Pt crystallite size (Scherrer) and theoretical surface area.

X Ray Photoelectron Spectroscopy Measurement

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#XRayPhotoelectronSpectroscopyMeasurement
Type
Measurement
altLabel
X-ray photoelectron spectroscopy

Surface chemical analysis measurement used to quantify elemental composition and chemical speciation of inks/catalysts.

Xrite Optical Property Measurement

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#XriteOpticalPropertyMeasurement
Type
Measurement
altLabel
X-rite

A measurement process that uses xrite optical property measurement to determine Transparency, Delta S, and Color Difference Delta Eab using Xrite Spectrophotometer.

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ZetaPotentialMeasurement
Type
Measurement
altLabel
surface zeta potential; ζ-potential measurement; electrophoretic mobility measurement

Measurement of zeta potential to assess colloidal stability of catalyst inks.

Instrument

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ACInputAmplitude

Parameter

Parameter

A parameter specifying catalyst mass fraction in ink solids used to characterize Catalyst Ink Preparation and Ink Recipe Definition.

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CatalystPlatinumMassFraction
Type
Parameter
altLabel
Pt fraction in catalyst (0.20); Pt fraction in catalyst; Pt mass fraction

Parameter
altLabel

Parameter

Parameter

Parameter

Parameter

altLabel
volume ratio of feed methane

A parameter specifying volume ratio of feed methane in inlet mixture (dimensionless).

Feed Rate

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#FeedRate
Type
Parameter
altLabel
ink feeding rate

A parameter specifying upward motion speed of the syringe/nozzle during pillar formation (controls stretching/shape).

Ferritin Analyte Concentration

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#FerritinAnalyteConcentration
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying ferritin concentration in incubation solutions during sensing experiments (pM range).

Ferritin Mass Concentration

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#FerritinMassConcentration
Type
Parameter
altLabel
concentration of ferritin; ferritin concentration

A parameter specifying mass concentration of ferritin in dialyzed precursor solutions (mg/L protein).

Ferritin Template Concentration

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#FerritinTemplateConcentration
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying ferritin concentration used as template during MIP formation (mass concentration).

Fiber Ionomer To Carbon Ratio

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#FiberIonomerToCarbonRatio
Type
Parameter
altLabel
I_fiber/C; fiber/carbon ratio

A parameter specifying mass ratio of electrospun fiber ionomer to carbon in iNFS-CL (paper notation Ifiber/C in parentheses).

Fiber Ionomer Volume Fraction

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#FiberIonomerVolumeFraction
Type
Parameter
altLabel
fiber ionomer vol%

A parameter specifying fiber ionomer volume fraction used to characterize Catalyst Layer Composition Specification.

Filler Weight Percent

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#FillerWeightPercent
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying filler content (geopolymer powder) expressed as wt.% dry basis.

Fixed Charge Concentration In Dry Ionomer

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#FixedChargeConcentrationInDryIonomer
Type
Parameter
altLabel
c_f; fixed charge concentration in dry Nafion

A parameter specifying fixed charge concentration in dry Nafion ionomer used for water storage calculations (mol/cm3).

Flow Channel Height

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#FlowChannelHeight
Type
Parameter
altLabel
channel height

A parameter specifying flow channel height used to characterize PEMFCCFD Simulation.

Flow Channel Width

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#FlowChannelWidth
Type
Parameter
altLabel
channel width

A parameter specifying flow channel width used to characterize PEMFCCFD Simulation.

Flow Field Design

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#FlowFieldDesign
Type
Parameter
altLabel
straight channel flow field

A parameter specifying flow field design.

Flow Field Rib Width

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#FlowFieldRibWidth
Type
Parameter
altLabel
rib width

A parameter specifying rib width in serpentine flow field.

Frame Rate

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#FrameRate
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying image acquisition frame rate for high-speed video.

Free MSA Weight Percent Based On QD

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#FreeMSAWeightPercentBasedOnQD
Type
Parameter
altLabel
free MSA wt% (based on QD)

A parameter specifying mass fraction of free (unbound) MSA ligand added relative to QD mass to improve dispersibility.

Frequency

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#Frequency
Type
Parameter
altLabel
peak frequency; characteristic frequency; f1

A parameter specifying frequency used to characterize Current-Interrupt HFR Measurement, Square Wave Voltammetry, and Spray Coating.

Frequency Range

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#FrequencyRange
Type
Parameter
altLabel
frequency scope; f range

A parameter specifying frequency range used to characterize Current-Interrupt HFR Measurement, Electrochemical Impedance Spectroscopy Potentiostatic, and Electrochemical Impedance Spectroscopy Galvanostatic.

FTIR Wavenumber Range

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#FTIRWavenumberRange
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying fTIR measurement wavenumber range used in this study.

Fuel Cell Operation Time

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#FuelCellOperationTime
Type
Parameter
altLabel
continuous fuel cell operation; operation time; operating time

A parameter specifying fuel cell operation time used to characterize MEA Durability Measurement.

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#GasComposition
Type
Parameter
altLabel
H2/O2; H2/N2; H2/air

A parameter specifying gas composition used to characterize Oxygen Gain/Loss Measurement, O2–N2 Switching Measurement, and Through-Plane Gas Transport Measurement.

Gas Diffusion Layer Porosity

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#GasDiffusionLayerPorosity
Type
Parameter
altLabel
GDL porosity; porosity of GDL; EGDL

A parameter specifying gas diffusion layer porosity used to characterize PEMFCCFD Simulation and Electrochemical Reaction Simulation.

Gas Diffusion Layer Thickness

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#GasDiffusionLayerThickness
Type
Parameter
altLabel
GDL thickness; l_b; GDL thickness Ib

A parameter specifying gas diffusion layer thickness used to characterize MEAAssembly Process, Electrochemical Impedance Spectroscopy Galvanostatic, and PEMFCCFD Simulation.

Gas Flow Rate

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#GasFlowRate
Type
Parameter
altLabel
mL/min; flow rate; L/min

A parameter specifying gas flow rate used to characterize MEAPolarization, Electrochemical Impedance Spectroscopy Potentiostatic, and Cyclic Voltammetry.

Gas Hourly Space Velocity

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#GasHourlySpaceVelocity
Type
Parameter
altLabel
GHSV; space velocity

A parameter specifying gas hourly space velocity (L/gcat/h) during DRM tests.

Gas Volumetric Flow Rate

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#GasVolumetricFlowRate
Type
Parameter
altLabel
gas flow rate (mL/min); gas flow rate; cc/min

A parameter specifying paper reports reactant flows in mL/min; ontology contains MassFlowRate but not volumetric flow rate.

Gasket Thickness

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#GasketThickness
Type
Parameter
altLabel
PTFE gaskets

A parameter specifying gasket thickness used to characterize MEAAssembly Process.

GDL Type

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#GDLType
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying GDL type used to characterize MEAPolarization.

Gel Point Time

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#GelPointTime
Type
Parameter
altLabel
G′=G″; intersection point time

A parameter specifying time when storage modulus equals loss modulus during UV curing, indicating onset of shape retention (12–14 s).

Glucose Concentration

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#GlucoseConcentration
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying glucose concentration used to characterize MEAPolarization.

Graphene Oxide To Lignin Mass Ratio

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#GrapheneOxideToLigninMassRatio
Type
Parameter
altLabel
GO/lignin ratio; GO:lignin; initial GO/lignin ratio

A parameter specifying mass ratio of graphene oxide to lignin in the ink/printed structure precursor (values: 15/85, 30/70, 50/50, 70/30, 100/0).

H 2 O Al 2 O 3 Molar Ratio

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#H2OAl2O3MolarRatio
Type
Parameter
altLabel
H2O/Al203; H2O/Al2O3

A parameter specifying molar ratio H2O/Al2O3 in geopolymer formulation.

Heating Rate

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#HeatingRate
Type
Parameter
altLabel
temperature ramp rate; heating rate (°C/min); ramp rate

A parameter specifying heating rate used in thermogravimetric experiments.

Height Step Size

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#HeightStepSize
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying vertical step size/resolution used in 3D surface scan.

Henrys Coefficient

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#HenrysCoefficient
Type
Parameter
altLabel
Henry's coefi cient

A parameter specifying henrys coefficient used to characterize Electrochemical Reaction Simulation.

Hg Hg O To RHE Offset

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#HgHgOToRHEOffset
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying potential conversion offset used by authors to convert Hg/HgO reference to RHE scale (paper-specific value).

Hidden Neuron Number

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#HiddenNeuronNumber
Type
Parameter
altLabel
hidden neurons; L=10

A parameter specifying model hyperparameter: number of hidden neurons in the network layer(s).

Hold Time

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#HoldTime
Type
Parameter
altLabel
hold at temperature; hot-press time; pressing time

A parameter specifying soak/hold time at peak temperature during sintering.

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#HomogenizationSpeed
Type
Parameter
altLabel
homogenizer speed

A parameter specifying rotor–stator homogenizer rotational speed used during ink mixing (15000 rpm).

Homogenization Temperature

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#HomogenizationTemperature
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying temperature during homogenization/mixing of catalyst ink (room temperature, 23°C).

Hot Press Force

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#HotPressForce
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying hot press force used to characterize Hot Pressing.

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#HotPressPressure
Type
Parameter
altLabel
hot press pressure/force per area; transfer pressure; pressing pressure

A parameter specifying hot press pressure used to characterize MEAAssembly Process, Hot Press, and Hot Pressing.

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#HotPressTemperature
Type
Parameter
altLabel
transfer temperature; hot-pressing temperature; pressing temperature

A parameter specifying hot press temperature used to characterize MEAAssembly Process, Hot Press, and Hot Pressing.

Hot Press Time

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#HotPressTime
Type
Parameter
altLabel
transfer time; pressing time; hot-pressing time

A parameter specifying hot press time used to characterize MEAAssembly Process, Hot Press, and Hot Pressing.

Humidifier Equilibration Time

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#HumidifierEquilibrationTime
Type
Parameter
altLabel
conditioning time

A parameter specifying equilibration time after RH change: 2 h.

Humidifier Temperature

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#HumidifierTemperature
Type
Parameter
altLabel
humidification temperature; bubbler temperature; humidification water bath temperature

A parameter specifying humidifier temperature for cathode gas humidification.

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#HydrazineConcentration
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying hydrazine (N2H4) concentration in alkaline anolyte feed.

Hydrochloric Acid Concentration

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#HydrochloricAcidConcentration
Type
Parameter
altLabel
HCl concentration

A parameter specifying hydrochloric acid concentration used to characterize Acid Etching Process.

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#HydrogenMonolayerChargeDensityOnPt
Type
Parameter
altLabel
charge required to reduce monolayer of protons on Pt

A parameter specifying constant used in ECSA calculation from CV; review gives Γ = 210 μC cm−2_Pt (Section 6.1.2).

Hydrogen Oxidation Charge Constant

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#HydrogenOxidationChargeConstant
Type
Parameter
altLabel
Q

A parameter specifying constant charge density for H oxidation on smooth Pt used in ESA calculation (Eq. 1).

Hydrogen Peroxide Volume

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#HydrogenPeroxideVolume
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying volume of H2O2 added to photodegradation reaction as oxidant/electron donor.

Hydrogen Purity

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#HydrogenPurity
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying hydrogen feed purity as given for the aging experiments.

Hydrogen Volumetric Flow Rate

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#HydrogenVolumetricFlowRate
Type
Parameter
altLabel
hydrogen flow; hydrogen flow rate; flow rate

A parameter specifying hydrogen volumetric flow rate used to characterize Cyclic Voltammetry, Fuel Cell Polarization Measurement, and Ambient Pressure Chemical Vapor Deposition Synthesis.

Hydrolysis Rate Slowdown Factor

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#HydrolysisRateSlowdownFactor
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying dimensionless factor indicating how much slower hydrolysis/acidification is at 25°C vs 75°C (as reported).

Illumination Beam Diameter

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#IlluminationBeamDiameter
Type
Parameter
altLabel
light beam diameter; beam diameter

A parameter specifying diameter of focused illumination beam used in high-speed imaging setup.

Image Height Pixels

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ImageHeightPixels
Type
Parameter
altLabel
image height

A parameter specifying image height in pixels for recorded frames.

Image Width Pixels

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ImageWidthPixels
Type
Parameter
altLabel
image width

A parameter specifying image width in pixels for recorded frames.

Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying impregnation cycles used to characterize Catalyst Impregnation.

Incubation Time

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#IncubationTime
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying incubation duration during rebinding experiments.

Parameter
altLabel

Parameter
altLabel

Parameter
altLabel
aging time; storage time; stability test time

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#InkBatchVolume
Type
Parameter
altLabel
Ink volume

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#InkDilutionRatio
Type
Parameter
altLabel

Type
Parameter
altLabel
aliquot volume

A parameter specifying volume of ink deposited on gold electrode for electrochemical tests.

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#InkMixingSpeed
Type
Parameter
altLabel
stirring speed; mixing speed

A parameter specifying mechanical stirring speed for ink mixing.

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#InkMixingTime
Type
Parameter
altLabel
stirring time; mixing time

A parameter specifying mechanical stirring time for ink mixing.

Type
Parameter
altLabel
IPA volume; isopropanol volume

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#InkStorageTime
Type
Parameter
altLabel
storage time

A parameter specifying ink storage/aging duration used when discussing shelf-life and dispersion stability; not present as named Parameter in ontology.

Ink Water Volume

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#InkWaterVolume
Type
Parameter
altLabel
water volume

A parameter specifying ink water volume used to characterize Catalyst Ink Preparation.

Inkjet Printing Spatial Resolution

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#InkjetPrintingSpatialResolution
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying smallest feature size / placement precision claimed for inkjet printing in this context (µm).

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#IntrinsicViscosity
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying intrinsic viscosity parameter from Krieger–Dougherty fit to high-shear relative viscosity data.

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#IonExchangeCapacity
Type
Parameter
altLabel
IEC; HNN9; HNN4

A parameter specifying ion exchange capacity used to characterize Limiting Current Measurement.

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#IonicStrength
Type
Parameter
altLabel
I; [H+]

A parameter specifying ionic strength of the ink dispersion medium (assumed salt-free; approximated by [H+]).

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#IonomerCoverageIntercept
Type
Parameter
altLabel
coverage intercept

A parameter specifying intercept term in the ionomer surface coverage correlation (Eq. 4).

Ionomer Coverage Ln Coefficient

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#IonomerCoverageLnCoefficient
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying coefficient multiplying ln(R_I/C) in the empirical/simulation correlation for ionomer surface coverage (Eq. 4).

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#IonomerDispersionMassFraction
Type
Parameter
altLabel
ionomer dispersion content; ionomer dispersion; diluted ionomer dispersion

A parameter specifying mass fraction of ionomer in the supplied dispersion (wt.%).

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#IonomerEquivalentWeight
Type
Parameter
altLabel
equivalent weight; EW; Aquivion

A parameter specifying ionomer equivalent weight used to characterize Catalyst Ink Preparation, Discrete Element Method Packing Simulation, and Ionomer Coating Simulation.

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#IonomerFilmResistanceExponentD
Type
Parameter
altLabel
D

A parameter specifying ionomer film resistance exponent D used to characterize Electrochemical Reaction Simulation.

Parameter

Type
Parameter
altLabel
Y_el; Nafion fraction; ionomer/catalyst mass ratio 3/7

Parameter

nanoporous ionomer

Parameter
altLabel
thin film thickness; Nafion thin film thickness; Nafion ionomer film thickness

A parameter specifying thickness of PFSA ionomer thin film covering catalyst particles in the cathode catalyst layer (distinct from bulk membrane thickness).

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#IonomerToCarbonRatio
Type
Parameter
altLabel
I/C ratio; I/C weight ratio; dry ionomer to carbon ratio

A parameter specifying ionomer to carbon ratio used to characterize Oxygen Gain/Loss Measurement, O2–N2 Switching Measurement, and Current-Interrupt HFR Measurement.

Parameter

ratio of FAA-3 ionomer to catalyst; ionomer-to-catalyst ratio; I/Cat

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#IonomerType
Type
Parameter
altLabel
PTFE ionomer; PVDF ionomer

A parameter specifying ionomer type used to characterize Catalyst Ink Preparation.

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#IonomerUniformity
Type
Parameter
altLabel
uniform ionomer distribution

A parameter specifying ionomer uniformity.

Type
Parameter
altLabel
ε_I; ionomer bulk volume fraction; ε_m

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#IonomerWeightPercentInCatalystLayer
Type
Parameter

Type
Parameter

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#IrradiationTime
Type
Parameter
altLabel

Type
Parameter

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#IsopropanolToWaterVolumeRatio
Type
Parameter
altLabel
isopropanol and water ratio 2:1

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#IsopropanolVolumeFractionInSolventMixture
Type
Parameter
altLabel
IPA; IPA volume fraction

A parameter specifying volume fraction of isopropanol in the IPA/H2O dispersing medium (DM); varied 10–70 vol% IPA.

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#K2OAl2O3MolarRatio
Type
Parameter

K2O/Al203; K2O/Al2O3

Parameter
altLabel

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#KnudsenNumber
Type
Parameter
altLabel
Kn

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#KOHConcentration
Type
Parameter
altLabel
M KOH

Type
Parameter

Type
Parameter

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#LaserPulseLength
Type
Parameter
altLabel
pulse length

A parameter specifying laser pulse duration used in PLD (e.g., 18 ns).

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#LaserRepetitionRate
Type
Parameter
altLabel
repetition rate

A parameter specifying laser repetition rate used in PLD (e.g., 10 Hz).

Type
Parameter

Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying increment in Z used for laser focus scanning in microscopy.

Parameter

Type
Parameter

Parameter

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#LiClToPBIWeightRatio
Type
Parameter
altLabel
[LiCl]/[PBI] weight ratio

A parameter specifying li cl to PBI weight ratio.

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#LigandExchangeReactionTime
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying duration of ligand exchange reaction/stirring.

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#LightSourcePower
Type
Parameter
altLabel

A parameter specifying lamp power used as visible-light source in photocatalytic experiments.

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#LiquidFlowRate
Type
Parameter
altLabel
anode feed flow rate; ink flow rate; flow rate

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#LogNormalStandardDeviation
Type
Parameter
altLabel
σ_lognormal

A parameter specifying standard deviation (log-normal) of aggregate diameter distribution; paper states 0.25.

Lower Potential Limit

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#LowerPotentialLimit
Type
Parameter
altLabel
lower limit; lower potential; lower limit potential

A parameter specifying lower limit of potential window for a protocol (V).

Magnetic Field Strength

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#MagneticFieldStrength
Type
Parameter
altLabel
magnetic field

A parameter specifying applied magnetic field for magneto-electrochemistry.

Mass Flow Rate

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#MassFlowRate
Type
Parameter
altLabel
mass flow rate H2; flow rate; nL/min

A parameter specifying mass flow rate used to characterize MEAPolarization, Cyclic Voltammetry, and PEMFCCFD Simulation.

Maximum Particle Volume Fraction

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#MaximumParticleVolumeFraction
Type
Parameter
altLabel
φ_max; maximum volume fraction

A parameter specifying maximum particle volume fraction parameter (φ_max) from Krieger–Dougherty model fit.

MEA Assembly Gap

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#MEAAssemblyGap
Type
Parameter
altLabel
constant gap; hot-press gap

Measurement Gap

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#MeasurementGap
Type
Parameter
altLabel
gap (rheometer); gap between plates; doctor blade gap

A parameter specifying rheometer plate gap used during measurements.

Membrane Porous Layer Thickness

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#MembranePorousLayerThickness
Type
Parameter
altLabel
porous layer thickness (membrane); porous layer thickness

A parameter specifying thickness of porous surface layer on a PEM (e.g., P-Nafion porous layer ~5 µm).

Membrane Thickness

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#MembraneThickness
Type
Parameter
altLabel
nominal thickness; membrane height; state-of-the-art membrane

A parameter specifying membrane thickness used to characterize Electrochemical Impedance Spectroscopy Potentiostatic, MEAAssembly Process, and PEMFCCFD Simulation.

Membrane Type

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#MembraneType
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying membrane type used to characterize MEAAssembly Process.

Mercury Intrusion Pressure

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#MercuryIntrusionPressure
Type
Parameter
altLabel
pressure min; pressure max

A parameter specifying applied pressure during mercury intrusion porosimetry measurement (min/max).

Mesopore Diameter

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#MesoporeDiameter
Type
Parameter
altLabel
pore diameter

A parameter specifying mesopore diameter.

Metal Mass Per Oil Mass

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#MetalMassPerOilMass
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying mass of alkali metal content per 100 g oil (as basis for comparison to homogeneous catalysts).

Type
Parameter
altLabel
methanol conc.; [CH3OH]; MeOH

A parameter specifying methanol molar concentration in anode feed.

Type
Parameter

Type
Parameter

methanol:oil

Parameter

Parameter

Parameter

MPL

Parameter

Parameter

Type
Parameter
altLabel

Parameter

Parameter

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#MSAWeightPercentOfQDPowder
Type
Parameter

Type
Parameter
altLabel
n-propanol (wt%); n-propanol fraction; WF_NPA

Parameter

Na20/Al203; Na2O/Al2O3

Type
Parameter
altLabel
Nafion fiber loading level; fiber loading level

Parameter

Parameter

Parameter

Parameter

Parameter

Parameter

Parameter

Parameter

Parameter

Parameter

Parameter

Parameter

Parameter

Type
Parameter

x_O2

Parameter

Parameter

Parameter

Parameter

Parameter

Parameter
altLabel
Pt loading (g/kW); Pt per power

A parameter specifying platinum loading normalized by rated power output (g Pt per kW), used by DOE performance index and NSTF electrode.

Pt Mass Fraction In Catalyst

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PtMassFractionInCatalyst
Type
Parameter
altLabel
Pt content in catalyst; Pt mass fraction; platinum mass fraction in catalyst

A parameter specifying pt mass fraction in catalyst used to characterize Catalyst Ink Preparation.

Pt On Carbon Catalyst Mass Fraction In Ink

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PtOnCarbonCatalystMassFractionInInk
Type
Parameter
altLabel
Pt/C wt.% in ink; Pt/Carbon (wt%); Pt/C catalyst concentration

A parameter specifying pt on carbon catalyst mass fraction in ink used to characterize Catalyst Ink Preparation.

Pt On Carbon Weight Percent

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PtOnCarbonWeightPercent
Type
Parameter
altLabel
Pt on carbon ratio; Pt mass fraction in Pt/C; Pt wt% on carbon

A parameter specifying pt mass fraction in Pt/C electrocatalyst (wt%). Used to tune CL thickness at constant Pt loading and I/C.

Pt Ru On Carbon Weight Percent

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PtRuOnCarbonWeightPercent
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying metal weight percent in PtRu/C catalyst (analogous to PtOnCarbonWeightPercent).

PTFE Loading Fraction Of Solids

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PTFELoadingFractionOfSolids
Type
Parameter
altLabel
PTFE loading; PTFE loading (wt.% of solids); HL

A parameter specifying PTFE loading fraction of solids used to characterize Ink Composition Specification and Ink Recipe Definition.

Pulse Current

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PulseCurrent
Type
Parameter
altLabel
i_pulse; current pulse

A parameter specifying description=Galvanostatic discharge current used for SC-MFC pulse tests.

Pulse Duration

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PulseDuration
Type
Parameter
altLabel
t_pulse; pulse time

A parameter specifying description=Duration of galvanostatic discharge pulse.

Purification Repetitions

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PurificationRepetitions
Type
Parameter
altLabel
repeated 3 times; multiple purifications; isolated by centrifugation (repeated 3 times)

A parameter specifying number of purification/centrifugation repetitions.

Pyrolysis Temperature

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PyrolysisTemperature
Type
Parameter
altLabel
heat treatment temperature; calcination temperature

A parameter specifying setpoint temperature used during pyrolysis heat treatment.

Pyrolysis Time

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PyrolysisTime
Type
Parameter
altLabel
calcination time

A parameter specifying duration of the pyrolysis heat treatment.

QD Ink Solvent Weight Ratio

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#QDInkSolventWeightRatio
Type
Parameter
altLabel
solvent ratio; co-solvent ratio; HXA:MEK

A parameter specifying mass ratio(s) of solvent components used in ink formulations.

QD Powder Mass

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#QDPowderMass
Type
Parameter
altLabel
QD powder (mg)

A parameter specifying mass of QD powder used in ligand exchange batch.

Quantum Dot Weight Percent In Ink

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#QuantumDotWeightPercentInInk
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying quantum-dot mass fraction in ink/photoresist formulation.

Ramp Rate

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#RampRate
Type
Parameter
altLabel
ramp-up rate; °C/min

A parameter specifying heating rate used during thermal treatment.

Raster Pitch

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#RasterPitch
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying Raster line pitch between adjacent serpentine passes during electrospray deposition. | Needed to capture raster pattern geometry; not found in ontology.

Reaction Area Position In Catalyst Layer

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ReactionAreaPositionInCatalystLayer
Type
Parameter
altLabel
reaction area position; reaction area moves from PEM to GDL

A parameter specifying categorical descriptor of where the active reaction layer (Y) is located through-plane: near PEM, mid-CL, or near GDL.

Reaction Layer Thickness Fraction In MCL

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ReactionLayerThicknessFractionInMCL
Type
Parameter
altLabel
proportion in MCL

A parameter specifying through-plane thickness fraction (percent) of layer Y within total cathode MCL.

Reaction Temperature

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ReactionTemperature
Type
Parameter
altLabel
synthesis temperature; T; treatment temperature

A parameter specifying temperature of transesterification reaction.

Reaction Time

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ReactionTime
Type
Parameter
altLabel
hold time; treatment time

A parameter specifying duration of transesterification reaction.

Reactor Tube Diameter

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ReactorTubeDiameter
Type
Parameter
altLabel
quartz tube diameter

A parameter specifying inner/nominal diameter of the quartz tube reactor (mm).

Reference Concentration

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ReferenceConcentration
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying reference concentration used to characterize PEMFCCFD Simulation.

Reference Current Density

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ReferenceCurrentDensity
Type
Parameter
altLabel
RCD; reference exchange density; reference current prefactor

A parameter specifying reference current density used to characterize Electrochemical Impedance Spectroscopy Galvanostatic and PEMFCCFD Simulation.

Reference Scale

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ReferenceScale
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying reference scale used to characterize Square Wave Voltammetry, Electrochemical Impedance Spectroscopy Potentiostatic, and Rotating Ring Disk Voltammetry.

Relative Humidity

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#RelativeHumidity
Type
Parameter
altLabel
RH; humidification; Relative humidity A/C

A parameter specifying relative humidity used to characterize Oxygen Gain/Loss Measurement, O2–N2 Switching Measurement, and Through-Plane Gas Transport Measurement.

Relative Humidity AST

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#RelativeHumidityAST
Type
Parameter
altLabel
RH_AST; relative humidity during voltage cycling

A parameter specifying relative humidity during accelerated stress test (voltage cycling). Distinct from RH_OP in paper.

Relative Humidity Operation

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#RelativeHumidityOperation
Type
Parameter
altLabel
RH_OP; RH during operation; RH

A parameter specifying relative humidity during a given measurement operation (CO stripping, polarization, etc.). Distinct from RH_AST in paper.

Relative Proton Conductivity Coefficient Low RIC

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#RelativeProtonConductivityCoefficientLowRIC
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying prefactor coefficient (2.3×) in low-R_I/C regime relative proton conductivity correlation (Eq. 7).

Relative Proton Conductivity Exponent RIC High

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#RelativeProtonConductivityExponentRICHigh
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying exponent on R_I/C in relative proton conductivity correlation for R_I/C ≥ threshold (uniform/heterogeneous high-R_I/C regime).

Relative Proton Conductivity Exponent RIC Low

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#RelativeProtonConductivityExponentRICLow
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying exponent on R_I/C in low-R_I/C regime relative proton conductivity correlation (Eq. 7).

Relative Proton Conductivity Exponent VCB

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#RelativeProtonConductivityExponentVCB
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying exponent on carbon volume fraction V_CB in relative proton conductivity correlation (both regimes).

Relative Proton Conductivity Threshold RIC

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#RelativeProtonConductivityThresholdRIC
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying threshold R_I/C separating regimes in heterogeneous ionomer coating relative conductivity correlation (percolation-like shift).

Removed Strip Width

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#RemovedStripWidth
Type
Parameter
altLabel
removed strips width; strip width

A parameter specifying removed strip width used to characterize Profilometry Sample Preparation.

Rest Time

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#RestTime
Type
Parameter
altLabel
self-recharge rest

A parameter specifying description=Rest time between pulses during SC-MFC testing (self-recharge period).

Retraction Rate

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#RetractionRate
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying speed used to retract nozzle from pillar tip to separate cleanly and stop flow.

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#RheologicalPercolationThresholdVolumeFraction
Type
Parameter
altLabel
φ_r; critical volume fraction (r

A parameter specifying rheological percolation threshold volume fraction.

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#RingCollectionEfficiency
Type
Parameter
altLabel
collection efficiency; N; collection efficiency N

A parameter specifying ring collection efficiency used to characterize Rotating Ring Disk Voltammetry.

Ring Potential

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#RingPotential
Type
Parameter
altLabel
ring electrode potential

A parameter specifying ring potential used to characterize Rotating Ring Disk Voltammetry.

Rolling Speed

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#RollingSpeed
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying roll-press process parameter controlling effective pressing duration.

Rotation Rate

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#RotationRate
Type
Parameter
altLabel
rotation speed; rotation speed (rpm); rotating speed

A parameter specifying rotation rate used to characterize Electrochemical Impedance Spectroscopy Potentiostatic, Rotating Ring Disk Voltammetry, and Cyclic Voltammetry.

Saturated Ionomer Water Content Lambda

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SaturatedIonomerWaterContentLambda
Type
Parameter
altLabel
λ_sat; saturated ionomer water content

A parameter specifying saturated ionomer water content (dimensionless) at given sub-zero temperature (10.3 at −10°C; 7.8 at −20°C).

Scaling Exponent A

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ScalingExponentA
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying scaling exponent in G0′ ∝ φ^A (Eq. 5).

Scaling Exponent B

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ScalingExponentB
Type
Parameter
altLabel
B

A parameter specifying scaling exponent in γ0 ∝ φ^B (Eq. 6).

Scaling Exponent T

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ScalingExponentT
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying scaling exponent in Σ ∝ (φ - φ_e,c)^t (Eq. 10).

Scan Rate

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ScanRate
Type
Parameter
altLabel
CV scan rate; scanning rate; scan rate (mV s−1)

A parameter specifying scan rate used to characterize Rotating Ring Disk Voltammetry, Cyclic Voltammetry, and ECSABy Double Layer Capacitance.

Scattering Angle

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ScatteringAngle
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying scattering angle used to characterize Dynamic Light Scattering Measurement.

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ScreenRuling
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying number of lines per centimeter in screen mesh used for printing.

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ScreenVolume
Type
Parameter
altLabel

A parameter specifying free volume of screen mesh per area, in BCM/cm2.

Type
Parameter
altLabel
segment area; disc electrode area

A parameter specifying geometric active area per segment in segmented cell (Methods 2.1).

Segment Count

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SegmentCount
Type
Parameter
altLabel
number of segments; ten segments

A parameter specifying number of segments in segmented cell (Methods 2.1).

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ShearMixingRepetitions
Type
Parameter
altLabel
repeated twenty times

A parameter specifying number of shear-mixing cycles (each 2 min) in blender.

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ShearMixingRestTime
Type
Parameter
altLabel
rest/open time; rest time

A parameter specifying rest time between blender shear-mixing cycles (blender left open).

Shear Rate

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ShearRate
Type
Parameter
altLabel
s^-1; shear rate (s^-1)

A parameter specifying shear rate experienced by ink during processing (e.g., 10^4–10^6 s^-1 in spraying).

Shear Rate Sweep Max

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ShearRateSweepMax
Type
Parameter
altLabel
steady-rate sweep; maximum shear rate; max shear rate

A parameter specifying maximum shear rate in steady-rate sweep test.

Shear Rate Sweep Min

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ShearRateSweepMin
Type
Parameter
altLabel
steady-rate sweep; minimum shear rate; min shear rate

A parameter specifying minimum shear rate in steady-rate sweep test.

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ShearStrain
Type
Parameter
altLabel
strain amplitude; mm/mm

A parameter specifying oscillatory shear strain amplitude used in DSO/3ITT rheology protocols.

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ShearStrainSweepMax
Type
Parameter
altLabel
dynamic strain sweep

Shear Strain Sweep Min

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ShearStrainSweepMin
Type
Parameter
altLabel
dynamic strain sweep

A parameter specifying minimum deformation/strain in dynamic strain sweep test.

Parameter

Type
Parameter

Simulation Particle Count

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SimulationParticleCount
Type
Parameter

Simulation Time Step Count

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SimulationTimeStepCount
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying dEM run length; paper states simulations executed with 30,000 timesteps.

Parameter
altLabel
final temperature; thermally sintered; post-sintering temperature

Type
Parameter
altLabel
window size

A parameter specifying number of past time steps used as the input window for sequence modeling.

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SMP10VolumePercent
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying SMP 10 volume percent used to characterize Ink Formulation Specification.

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SodiumContentWeightPercent
Type
Parameter
altLabel
Sodium content (wt.%)

A parameter specifying sodium content in geopolymer lattice expressed as wt.% (dry basis).

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SolidContentFraction
Type
Parameter
altLabel
solid content; solids content; S.C.

A parameter specifying solid content fraction used to characterize Catalyst Ink Preparation, Dynamic Light Scattering Measurement, and Rheology Measurement.

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SolidLoadingVolumeFraction
Type
Parameter
altLabel
solid loading

A parameter specifying volume fraction of solids in ink (reported for aluminum ink).

Solution Volume

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SolutionVolume
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying volume of RhB aqueous solution used in photodegradation test.

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SolventEvaporationRate
Type
Parameter
altLabel
evaporation rate of solvent; evaporation rate

A parameter specifying mass-fraction evaporation rate during annealing (controlled constant).

Solvent Mass Ratio

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SolventMassRatio
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying mass ratio between solvents in ink formulation (e.g., IPA:butyl acetate = 1:1).

Solvent To Carbon Ratio

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SolventToCarbonRatio
Type
Parameter
altLabel
SCR; GCR; glycerol-to-carbon ratio

A parameter specifying mass ratio of ink solvent (here mainly glycerol) to carbon in catalyst ink.

Solvent To Water Volume Ratio

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SolventToWaterVolumeRatio
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying solvent to water volume ratio used to characterize Catalyst Ink Preparation.

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SolventType
Type
Parameter
altLabel
alcohol type; organic solvent; dispersing solvent

Parameter

Type
Parameter
altLabel
ultrasonic power; W; ultrasonic bath power

Type
Parameter
altLabel
probe sonication duration; ultrasonication time; sonicating for two minutes

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SpacerThickness
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying spacer thickness between identical electrodes in symmetric dummy cell for EIS/Tafel.

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SpanningDistance
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying distance between supports for an unsupported filament span in the lattice design.

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SpinCoatingSpeed
Type
Parameter
altLabel
spin speed

A parameter specifying spin-coating speed used to deposit QD photoresist films.

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SpinCoatingTime
Type
Parameter
altLabel
spin time

A parameter specifying spin coating time.

Type
Parameter
altLabel
air flow pressure; air pressure; expulsion pressure

A parameter specifying atomizing air pressure during spray coating (set by regulator).

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SprayAngle
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying spray angle used to characterize Spray Coating.

Spray Coating Pass Count

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SprayCoatingPassCount
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying number of ultrasonic spray coating passes/run times used to deposit a given layer.

Spray Distance

Type
Parameter
altLabel
nozzle-to-electrode distance

A parameter specifying spray distance used to characterize Spray Coating.

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SprayDuration
Type
Parameter

Spray Speed

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SpraySpeed
Type
Parameter
altLabel
nozzle speed

A parameter specifying nozzle travel speed during each spray pass.

Parameter

A parameter specifying current used during sputter coating (mA).

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SputterCoatingTime
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying duration of gold sputter coating prior to SEM (s).

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SquareWaveAmplitude
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying square wave amplitude used to characterize Square Wave Voltammetry.

Type
Parameter
altLabel
stirring rate; mixing speed (rpm); mixing speed

Type
Parameter
altLabel
stirred overnight; rolling time; mixing time (min)

Type
Parameter
altLabel
subzero storage temperature

Type
Parameter

Parameter

Parameter

Parameter

Parameter

hot-plate temperature; spray deposition temperature; spray temperature

A parameter specifying substrate temperature during spray coating to accelerate solvent evaporation between passes.

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SurfactantSolutionConcentration
Type
Parameter

Type
Parameter

Type
Parameter
altLabel
distance from catalyst pellet

Type
Parameter

Temperature

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#Temperature
Type
Parameter
altLabel
cell temperature; operating temperature; room temperature

A parameter specifying temperature used to characterize MEAPolarization, Square Wave Voltammetry, and Electrochemical Impedance Spectroscopy Potentiostatic.

Template Removal Duration

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#TemplateRemovalDuration

Parameter

Test Duration

Parameter
altLabel

Type
Parameter
altLabel
k_i; through-plane thermal conductivity

Parameter

Parameter

Parameter

Parameter

Parameter

Parameter
