https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#UpperPotentialLimit
Type
Parameter
altLabel
upper limit; upper potential; upper potential value

A parameter specifying upper limit of potential window for a protocol (V).

UV Bandwidth

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#UVBandwidth
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying spectral bandwidth during UV–vis acquisition.

UV Exposure Time

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#UVExposureTime
Type
Parameter
altLabel
exposure time

A parameter specifying uV exposure duration in photolithography.

UV Irradiance

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#UVIrradiance
Type
Parameter
altLabel
UV light intensity

A parameter specifying incident UV irradiance used for curing during photorheology/FTIR (reported ~28 mW/cm2).

UV Irradiation Time

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#UVIrradiationTime
Type
Parameter
altLabel
UV exposure time

A parameter specifying duration of UV exposure during curing (e.g., 2–14 s values discussed).

UV Scan Speed

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#UVScanSpeed
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying UV scan speed used to characterize UV Visible Spectroscopy Measurement.

UV Wavelength Range

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#UVWavelengthRange
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying wavelength range over which UV intensity was monitored/detected (230–410 nm).

Vacuum Chamber Pressure

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#VacuumChamberPressure
Type
Parameter
altLabel
vacuum pressure

A parameter specifying vacuum chamber pressure used to characterize Vacuum Drying.

Vacuum Drying Time

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#VacuumDryingTime
Type
Parameter
altLabel
solvent evaporation time; drying time

A parameter specifying vacuum drying time used before/after ligand exchange.

Vacuum Pressure

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#VacuumPressure
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying vacuum pressure applied during degassing, freeze drying, or impregnation (Pa).

Viscosity Recovery High Shear Duration

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ViscosityRecoveryHighShearDuration
Type
Parameter
altLabel
viscosity recovery; high shear duration

A parameter specifying duration of high shear step in viscosity recovery test.

Viscosity Recovery Shear Rate High

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ViscosityRecoveryShearRateHigh
Type
Parameter
altLabel
viscosity recovery; high shear rate

A parameter specifying high shear rate applied in viscosity recovery test.

Viscosity Recovery Shear Rate Low

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ViscosityRecoveryShearRateLow
Type
Parameter
altLabel
viscosity recovery; low shear rate

A parameter specifying low shear rate applied in viscosity recovery test.

Voxel Size

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#VoxelSize
Type
Parameter
altLabel
pixel size; nm/voxel

A parameter specifying tomography voxel volume or voxel edge length used in reconstruction.

Water Bath Temperature

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#WaterBathTemperature
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying temperature of cooling bath during ultrasonication (paper reports 5 °C).

Water Content Fraction

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#WaterContentFraction
Type
Parameter
altLabel
water content

A parameter specifying water content fraction.

Water Drop Volume

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#WaterDropVolume
Type
Parameter
altLabel
μL

A parameter specifying liquid volume used for sessile-drop contact angle test.

Water Mass Fraction In Ink

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#WaterMassFractionInInk
Type
Parameter
altLabel
ink H2O content

A parameter specifying mass fraction of extra added water in the ink (not counting water already in Nafion dispersion).

Water Mass Fraction In Solvent Mixture

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#WaterMassFractionInSolventMixture
Type
Parameter
altLabel
water fraction in solvent; water fraction; water-rich solvent

A parameter specifying mass fraction of water in the solvent mixture used in ionomer dispersion or catalyst ink.

Water To Ethanol Ratio

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#WaterToEthanolRatio
Type
Parameter
altLabel
water/ethanol ratio 3:2; water/ethanol ratio; ethanol:water 1:1

A parameter specifying solvent mixing ratio water:ethanol = 3:2 used for inks and carbon dispersion.

Water To Isopropanol Molar Ratio

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#WaterToIsopropanolMolarRatio
Type
Parameter
altLabel
[Water]/[IPA] (molar ratio)

A parameter specifying water to isopropanol molar ratio used to characterize Ink Ultrasonication, Solvent Physical Property Compilation, and Solvent Property Lookup.

Water To Isopropanol Volume Ratio

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#WaterToIsopropanolVolumeRatio
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying proposed_new_term. paper_context: Ratio of water to isopropanol in ink solvent (stated as 1:1).

Water To N Propanol Volume Ratio

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#WaterToNPropanolVolumeRatio
Type
Parameter
altLabel
H2O/alcohol volume ratio; H2O/n-PA volume ratio; water:propanol ratio

A parameter specifying water to N propanol volume ratio used to characterize Catalyst Ink Preparation.

Water To N Propanol Weight Ratio

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#WaterToNPropanolWeightRatio
Type
Parameter
altLabel
water/propan-1-ol weight ratio; water/propan-1-ol weight ratio = 4.32

A parameter specifying mass ratio of water to n-propanol in solvent mixture (paper reports weight ratio; ontology has volume-ratio variants).

Water Vapor Concentration Ppm

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#WaterVaporConcentrationPpm
Type
Parameter
altLabel
water vapour concentration

A parameter specifying water vapor concentration ppm used to characterize Water Assisted Low Pressure CVD.

Water Vapor Volumetric Flow Rate

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#WaterVaporVolumetricFlowRate
Type
Parameter
altLabel
water vapor (0–35 cm3/min); water vapor flow

A parameter specifying water vapor volumetric flow rate used to characterize Ambient Pressure Chemical Vapor Deposition Synthesis.

Wavelength

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#Wavelength
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying wavelength used to characterize UV Visible Spectroscopy Measurement, Photoluminescence Spectroscopy Measurement, and External Quantum Efficiency Measurement.

Wavelength Cutoff

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#WavelengthCutoff
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying cutoff wavelength of optical filter used during visible-light irradiation.

Web Tension

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#WebTension
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying web tension used to characterize Slot Die Coating.

Wetting Dip Time

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#WettingDipTime
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying pre-wetting dip time in ethanol/water mixture prior to CV.

Wetting Solvent To Water Volume Ratio

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#WettingSolventToWaterVolumeRatio
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying volume ratio used for pre-wetting coated electrode prior to CV (~1:9 ethanol:water v/v).

Working Time Deformation

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#WorkingTimeDeformation
Type
Parameter
altLabel
working time

A parameter specifying deformation amplitude used for working-time evaluation.

Working Time Duration

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#WorkingTimeDuration
Type
Parameter
altLabel
working time

A parameter specifying duration of working-time determination test.

Working Time Frequency

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#WorkingTimeFrequency
Type
Parameter
altLabel
working time

A parameter specifying frequency used for working-time evaluation.

X Ray Beam Energy

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#XRayBeamEnergy
Type
Parameter
altLabel
beam energy

A parameter specifying monochromatic X-ray beam energy used in diffraction/tomography.

X Ray Wavelength

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#XRayWavelength
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying X ray wavelength used to characterize X Ray Diffraction Measurement.

XRD Step Size

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#XRDStepSize
Type
Parameter
altLabel
step size

A parameter specifying XRD step size used to characterize X Ray Diffraction Measurement.

XRD Two Theta End

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#XRDTwoThetaEnd
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying xRD scan upper bound of 2θ range (degrees).

XRD Two Theta Start

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#XRDTwoThetaStart
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying xRD scan lower bound of 2θ range (degrees).

XTM Scan Time

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#XTMScanTime
Type
Parameter
altLabel
scan time

A parameter specifying proposed_new_term. paper_context: Duration of a single XTM scan (1 h).

Zeta Potential Stability Threshold

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ZetaPotentialStabilityThreshold
Type
Parameter
altLabel
mV stability threshold; mV threshold

A parameter specifying rule-of-thumb absolute zeta potential thresholds for dispersion stability cited in the paper.

Zr B 2 Volume Percent

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ZrB2VolumePercent
Type
Parameter

A parameter specifying zr B 2 volume percent used to characterize Ink Formulation Specification.

Properties

525 terms

Absorption Peak Wavelength

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#AbsorptionPeakWavelength
Type
Property
altLabel
absorption peak

A property denoting wavelength of UV–Vis absorption maxima (e.g., porphyrin Soret/Q bands, peaks observed in solid-state/solution).

Acid Doping Level

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#AcidDopingLevel
Type
Property
altLabel
ADL; PA-doping level; PA_dop

A property denoting phosphoric-acid doping level of PBI/PIM membrane (mol PA per mol repeat unit).

Acid Mass Uptake Ratio

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#AcidMassUptakeRatio
Type
Property
altLabel
mass uptake ratio

A property denoting fractional mass increase upon acid doping measured by QCM (Δm/m0); used to estimate acid uptake.

Acid Uptake Weight Percent

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#AcidUptakeWeightPercent
Type
Property
altLabel
Acid uptake (wt%); acid uptake

A property denoting acid uptake weight percent and determined in Acid Uptake Measurement.

Acid Value

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#AcidValue
Type
Property
altLabel
acidity

A property denoting acid value and determined in Acid Base Titration Measurement.

Adsorbed Aggregate Lateral Size

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#AdsorbedAggregateLateralSize
Type
Property
altLabel
lateral size of adsorbed aggregates; aggregate size (AFM); lateral size

A property denoting adsorbed aggregate lateral size and determined in Atomic Force Microscopy Measurement.

Ag Ag Cl Potential Vs RHE

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#AgAgClPotentialVsRHE
Type
Property
altLabel
E_Ag/AgCl = 1.015-1.026 V_RHE; Ag/AgCl potential against RHE; E_Ag/AgCl

A property denoting potential of Ag/AgCl reference electrode expressed on the RHE scale (offset/conversion factor) measured for each electrolyte batch.

Agglomerate Surface Area

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#AgglomerateSurfaceArea
Type
Property

A property denoting surface area of ink agglomerates (mentioned as an ink-stage descriptor; no numeric values in this source).

Al Content Wt

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#AlContentWt
Type
Property
altLabel
Al content; wt.% Al

A property denoting aluminum weight percent in LDH (from ICP-AES).

Anode Potential

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#AnodePotential
Type
Property
altLabel
MFC-CICo; MFC-CIFe; MFC-Pt

A property denoting anode electrode potential measured vs Ag/AgCl during operation/polarization.

Anode Reaction Resistance

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#AnodeReactionResistance
Type
Property
altLabel
ARR

A property denoting combined anode reaction resistance ARR = Rct*R0/(Rct+R0) reported for methanol oxidation at 0.5 V.

Anode Resistance

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#AnodeResistance
Type
Property
altLabel
RA

A property denoting description=Anode resistance extracted from anode ohmic drop during pulse (Ohm).

Apparent Density

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ApparentDensity
Type
Property
altLabel
ρ_a

A property denoting apparent density measured by helium pycnometry on fragments.

Area Normalized Anode Resistance

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#AreaNormalizedAnodeResistance
Type
Property
altLabel
area based resistance; MFC-CICo; MFC-CIFe

A property denoting anode resistance normalized by electrode area from EPS analysis (Ω·m^2).

Area Normalized Cathode Resistance

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#AreaNormalizedCathodeResistance
Type
Property
altLabel
area based resistance; MFC-CICo; MFC-CIFe

A property denoting cathode resistance normalized by electrode area from EPS analysis (Ω·m^2).

Area Normalized Overall Resistance

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#AreaNormalizedOverallResistance
Type
Property
altLabel
whole-cell area resistance; overall area resistance; MFC-CICo

A property denoting overall cell resistance normalized by electrode area from EPS analysis (Ω·m^2).

Areal Water Storage Space

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ArealWaterStorageSpace
Type
Property
altLabel
water storage space; water storage capacity

A property denoting areal water storage space and determined in Water Storage Space Calculation.

Astrocyte Cell Area

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#AstrocyteCellArea
Type
Property
altLabel
mean astrocyte area; µm²

A property denoting average cell area for astrocytes on substrates, quantified from microscopy images.

Astrocyte Percentage

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#AstrocytePercentage
Type
Property
altLabel
percentage of astrocytes; % astrocytes

A property denoting fraction of astrocytes in mixed neural culture attached to each substrate, quantified via immunostaining.

Average Chopped Fiber Length

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#AverageChoppedFiberLength
Type
Property
altLabel
average SiC fiber length; Average SiC fiber length (mm)

A property denoting mean chopped SiC fiber length after mixing (mm).

Average Pore Diameter

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#AveragePoreDiameter
Type
Property
altLabel
pore diameter; mean pore diameter; average pore size

A property denoting average pore diameter and determined in X Ray Computed Tomography Imaging, Nitrogen Physisorption Measurement, and Mercury Intrusion Porosimetry Measurement.

Average Pore Size

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#AveragePoreSize
Type
Property
altLabel
pore size; BJH pore size; mean pore size

A property denoting average pore size of carbon xerogel support (reported characteristic value).

Backbone Attachment Molar Percent

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#BackboneAttachmentMolarPercent
Type
Property
altLabel
RFB; molar % of backbone fluorine atoms attached to graphite; backbone attachment ratio

A property denoting backbone attachment molar percent and determined in Ionomer Coating Simulation.

Band Gap Energy

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#BandGapEnergy
Type
Property
altLabel
Eg; energy bandgap; band gap

A property denoting optical band gap energy estimated from UV–Vis diffuse reflectance and Tauc plot.

Bandgap Energy

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#BandgapEnergy
Type
Property
altLabel
band gap; narrow bandgap; Eg

A property denoting bandgap energy and determined in Review Statement Extraction, Reported Material Property, and UV Visible Spectroscopy Measurement.

BET Surface Area Nitrogen

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#BETSurfaceAreaNitrogen
Type
Property
altLabel
BET surface area (N2); S_BET(N2); BET area

A property denoting bET surface area measured by N2 adsorption at 77 K.

BET Surface Area Octane Adsorption

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#BETSurfaceAreaOctaneAdsorption
Type
Property
altLabel
BET; BET surface area; specific surface area

A property denoting bET specific surface area of dry Pt/C powders measured using octane adsorption in dynamic vapour sorption (DVS). | Proposed because ontology has BETSurfaceAreaNitrogen/WaterVapor but not octane/DVS.

BET Surface Area Water Vapor

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#BETSurfaceAreaWaterVapor
Type
Property
altLabel
BET surface area (H2O); S_BET(H2O)

A property denoting bET-like surface area from water vapor adsorption; used for hydrophilicity metric.

Binder Mass Loss Fraction

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#BinderMassLossFraction
Type
Property
altLabel
binder loss

A property denoting binder mass loss fraction and determined in Thermogravimetric Analysis Measurement.

Binding Energy

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#BindingEnergy
Type
Property
altLabel
XPS peak binding energy; XPS binding energy

A property denoting binding energy position of XPS peaks (eV) used to evidence fluorocarbon species on Pt(111).

Biomimetic Vein Structure

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#BiomimeticVeinStructure
Type
Property
altLabel
leaf vein structure

A property denoting hierarchical pore architecture inspired by leaf veins.

Boiling Point

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#BoilingPoint
Type
Property
altLabel
Tb; boiling temperature; bp

A property denoting boiling point of solvent; proxy for volatility and drying behavior.

Bulk Density

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#BulkDensity
Type
Property
altLabel
ρ_b; ink density; Archimedes density

A property denoting bulk density computed from mass/volume of printed lattice body.

Bulk Sedimentation Time

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#BulkSedimentationTime
Type
Property
altLabel
BsT

A property denoting time to bulk sedimentation / phase separation in analytical centrifuge transmittograms; not present as named Property in ontology.

C 1 s Atomic Percent

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#C1sAtomicPercent
Type
Property
altLabel
C atomic percent; carbon atomic percent

A property denoting atomic percent of carbon (from C 1s signal) measured by XPS.

C 1 s Peak Fraction C O

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#C1sPeakFraction_C_O
Type
Property
altLabel
C-O peak fraction

A property denoting fraction (%) of C1s peak assigned to C–O at 286.50 eV from XPS deconvolution.

C 1 s Peak Fraction CC CH

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#C1sPeakFraction_CC_CH
Type
Property
altLabel
C=C; C−H peak fraction

A property denoting fraction (%) of C1s peak assigned to C=C/C–C/C–H at 284.50 eV from XPS deconvolution.

C 1 s Peak Fraction Ceq O

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#C1sPeakFraction_CeqO
Type
Property
altLabel
C=O peak fraction

A property denoting fraction (%) of C1s peak assigned to C=O at 288.00 eV from XPS deconvolution.

C 1 s Peak Fraction O Ceq O

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#C1sPeakFraction_O_CeqO
Type
Property
altLabel
O=C−O peak fraction

A property denoting fraction (%) of C1s peak assigned to O=C–O at 289.00 eV from XPS deconvolution.

Capacitance

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#Capacitance
Type
Property
altLabel
capacitance (µF); C; capacitance (total)

A property denoting total measured capacitance (non-normalized) of the electrode/electrolyte interface from EIS fit.

Capillary Pressure In Membrane

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CapillaryPressureInMembrane
Type
Property
altLabel
capillary pressure; acid pressure in membrane

A property denoting proposed_new_term. paper_context: Capillary pressure (mbar) built up in membrane inferred from operando crack saturation vs ex situ filling curves.

Carbon Agglomerate Core Radius

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CarbonAgglomerateCoreRadius
Type
Property
altLabel
core radius of carbon agglomerates; core radius

A property denoting carbon agglomerate core radius and determined in Contrast Variation SANSUSANS Measurement.

Carbon Aggregate Effective Density

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CarbonAggregateEffectiveDensity
Type
Property
altLabel
effective density; ρ_e

A property denoting carbon aggregate effective density.

Carbon Aggregate Ionomer Particle Radius Of Gyration

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CarbonAggregateIonomerParticleRadiusOfGyration
Type
Property
altLabel
Rg of carbon aggregate–ionomer particles; carbon aggregate–Nafion particle size

A property denoting radius of gyration (Rg) of carbon aggregate–ionomer core–shell particles in catalyst ink (without contrast-match).

Carbon Aggregate Radius Of Gyration

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CarbonAggregateRadiusOfGyration
Type
Property
altLabel
Rg of carbon aggregates in catalyst ink; radius of gyration of carbon aggregates; Rg of carbon aggregates

A property denoting radius of gyration (Rg) of carbon support aggregates in catalyst ink (Nafion contrast-matched), from Guinier–Porod fits.

Carbon Black Aggregate Anisotropy Ratio

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CarbonBlackAggregateAnisotropyRatio
Type
Property
altLabel
anisotropy ratio

A property denoting anisotropy ratio of CB aggregates (ratio of long to short axis length in circumscribing prolate spheroid), used for validation (range ~1–4).

Carbon Black Particle Size

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CarbonBlackParticleSize
Type
Property
altLabel
carbon black size; carbon support particle size; carbon particle diameter

A property denoting primary carbon black particle size supporting Pt nanoparticles (nm scale).

Carbon Fiber Diameter

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CarbonFiberDiameter
Type
Property
altLabel
fiber diameter; nanofiber diameter

A property denoting carbon fiber diameter and determined in Electron Microscopy Imaging.

Carbon Nanotube Complete Decomposition Temperature

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CarbonNanotubeCompleteDecompositionTemperature
Type
Property
altLabel
complete decomposition temperature

A property denoting temperature above which CNT material is fully decomposed/oxidized in TGA under ambient atmosphere (°C).

Carbon Nanotube Decomposition Onset Temperature

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CarbonNanotubeDecompositionOnsetTemperature
Type
Property
altLabel
decomposition onset

A property denoting temperature at which CO2 evolution / CNT decomposition is first observed in TG-MS under ambient atmosphere (°C).

Carbon Nanotube Forest Height

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CarbonNanotubeForestHeight
Type
Property
altLabel
forest height; CNT forest height

A property denoting carbon nanotube forest height and determined in Electron Microscopy Imaging and Scanning Electron Microscopy Imaging.

Carbon Nanotube Outer Diameter

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CarbonNanotubeOuterDiameter
Type
Property
altLabel
CNT diameter; outer nanotube diameter; VACNT diameter

A property denoting carbon nanotube outer diameter and determined in Electron Microscopy Imaging and Transmission Electron Microscopy Imaging.

Carbon Nanotube Wall Count

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CarbonNanotubeWallCount
Type
Property

A property denoting number of concentric graphene walls in a multiwalled carbon nanotube (TEM).

Carbon Nitrogen Defect Fraction Percent

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CarbonNitrogenDefectFractionPercent
Type
Property
altLabel
C-N; carbon-nitrogen defects

A property denoting percent contribution of carbon-nitrogen defect component in C 1s XPS deconvolution.

Carbon Oxide Fraction Percent

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CarbonOxideFractionPercent
Type
Property
altLabel
$Cx0y$; C_xO_y

A property denoting percent contribution of carbon oxide component in C 1s XPS deconvolution.

Carbon Primary Particle Diameter

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CarbonPrimaryParticleDiameter
Type
Property
altLabel
primary carbon nanoparticle diameter; carbon particle diameter

A property denoting diameter of primary carbon nanoparticles observed in HRTEM (reported ~25 nm).

Carbon Shell Thickness

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CarbonShellThickness
Type
Property
altLabel
carbon shell thickness (graphitic planes); graphitic shell thickness

A property denoting thickness of the graphitic shell of hollow primary carbon nanoparticles (reported ~3 nm).

Carbon To Oxygen Atom Ratio

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CarbonToOxygenAtomRatio
Type
Property
altLabel
C/O atom ratio; C/O; C/0 atom ratio

A property denoting carbon-to-oxygen atomic ratio reported from XPS.

Carbon Weight Percent In Catalyst

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CarbonWeightPercentInCatalyst
Type
Property

A property denoting carbon weight percent in catalyst.

Carbon Yield

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CarbonYield
Type
Property
altLabel
char yield

A property denoting carbon yield (mass retained after pyrolysis) attributed to lignin content; referenced qualitatively and via TGA/porosity discussion (not tabulated).

Catalyst Layer Morphology

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CatalystLayerMorphology
Type
Property
altLabel
cracked mudflat morphology; mud-crack morphology; surface morphology

A property denoting qualitative morphology of sprayed catalyst layer surface (e.g., cracked mudflat vs loose particle deposits) inferred from SEM.

Catalyst Layer Thickness

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CatalystLayerThickness_2
Type
Property
altLabel
CL thickness

A property denoting thickness of catalyst layer (typically in µm; ordered CLs can be <1 µm).

Catalyst Particle Diameter

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CatalystParticleDiameter
Type
Property
altLabel
diameter of catalyst particle

A property denoting catalyst particle diameter and determined in Scanning Electron Microscopy Imaging.

Catalyst Particle Surface Area

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CatalystParticleSurfaceArea
Type
Property
altLabel
Surface area [nm²]; accessible surface area; SIRT/DART

A property denoting 3D reconstructed accessible surface area of a Pt/Ru catalyst network from electron tomography.

Catalyst Particle Volume

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CatalystParticleVolume
Type
Property
altLabel
Volume [nm³]; reconstructed volume; SIRT/DART

A property denoting 3D reconstructed volume of a Pt/Ru catalyst network from electron tomography.

Catalyst Ruthenium Mass Fraction

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CatalystRutheniumMassFraction
Type
Property

A property denoting ruthenium mass fraction in PtRu black catalyst from EDX.

Catalyst Transfer Rate

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CatalystTransferRate
Type
Property
altLabel
degree of catalyst transfer; decal transfer rate; transfer rate

A property denoting fraction/percent of catalyst layer transferred from substrate to membrane during decal transfer.

Cathode Capacitance

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CathodeCapacitance
Type
Property
altLabel
Cc

A property denoting description=Cathode capacitance (Cc) extracted from cathode potential slope during discharge (F).

Cathode Potential

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CathodePotential
Type
Property
altLabel
electrode potential; MFC-CICo; MFC-CIFe

A property denoting cathode electrode potential vs reference electrode at specified current density or open circuit.

Cathode Resistance

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CathodeResistance
Type
Property
altLabel
Rc

A property denoting description=Cathode resistance extracted from cathode ohmic drop during pulse (Ohm).

Cathodic Stripping Peak Current

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CathodicStrippingPeakCurrent
Type
Property

A property denoting cathodic stripping peak current and determined in Cathodic Stripping Voltammetry.

Cell Capacitance

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CellCapacitance
Type
Property
altLabel
Ccell; apparent capacitance

A property denoting description=Apparent cell capacitance (Ccell) extracted from voltage slope during discharge (F).

Cell Voltage

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CellVoltage
Type
Property
altLabel
cell potential; U; applied voltage

A property denoting fuel cell cell voltage (V) under galvanostatic operation.

Cell Voltage Increase Rate

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CellVoltageIncreaseRate
Type
Property
altLabel
increase in iR-corrected cell voltage

A property denoting Rate of increase of (iR-corrected) cell voltage during long-term galvanostatic stability test (mV/h).

Cell Voltage Loss

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CellVoltageLoss
Type
Property
altLabel
mV loss; mV loss at current density; voltage loss

A property denoting cell voltage loss and determined in MEA Durability Measurement.

Cell Voltage Loss Percent

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CellVoltageLossPercent
Type
Property
altLabel
voltage loss %

A property denoting percent loss in cell voltage over a defined durability interval at constant current.

Ceramic Yield

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CeramicYield
Type
Property

A property denoting mass fraction retained after pyrolysis (reported up to 70%).

Charge Storage Capacity

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ChargeStorageCapacity
Type
Property
altLabel
CSC

A property denoting integrated charge per area obtained from cyclic voltammograms; used as indicator of electrode charge storage and percolation onset.

Charge Transfer Plus Mass Transport Resistance

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ChargeTransferPlusMassTransportResistance
Type
Property
altLabel
large semicircle resistance; Rct+Rm

A property denoting paper reports fitted EIS component as combined (Rct + Rm) and does not separate components.

Charge Transfer Resistance

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ChargeTransferResistance
Type
Property
altLabel
R_ct; charge transfer resistivity; faradaic resistance

A property denoting charge transfer resistance and determined in Electrochemical Impedance Spectroscopy Potentiostatic, Electrochemical Impedance Spectroscopy Galvanostatic, and Distribution Of Relaxation Times Analysis.

CNT Growth Yield Percent

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CNTGrowthYieldPercent
Type
Property
altLabel
yield of obtained CNTs

A property denoting yield of CNT growth based on fraction of catalyst particles that produce CNTs (%).

Co 2 Co 3 Ratio

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#Co2Co3Ratio
Type
Property
altLabel
Co2+/Co3+

A property denoting xPS-derived surface oxidation-state ratio for Co.

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CO2Conversion
Type
Property
altLabel
X_CO2; carbon dioxide conversion

A property denoting CO 2 conversion and determined in Dry Reforming Of Methane Performance Measurement.

Co 2 p Atomic Percent

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#Co2pAtomicPercent
Type
Property
altLabel
Co atomic wt.%

A property denoting atomic percent of cobalt (from Co 2p signal) measured by XPS.

Co To N Ratio

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CoToNRatio
Type
Property
altLabel
Co/N; Co/N ratio

A property denoting ratio of cobalt to nitrogen signal (Co/N) reported from XPS quantification.

Cobalt Weight Percent In Catalyst Layer

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CobaltWeightPercentInCatalystLayer
Type
Property
altLabel
Co

A property denoting eDS-reported normalized cobalt concentration in Pt–Co catalyst layer (wt.%).

COD Removal Efficiency

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CODRemovalEfficiency
Type
Property
altLabel
MFC-CICo; MFC-CIFe; MFC-Pt

A property denoting wastewater treatment performance metric: percent COD removed between influent and effluent.

Coefficient Of Determination R 2

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CoefficientOfDeterminationR2
Type
Property
altLabel
R2; coefficient of determination

A property denoting prediction performance metric: coefficient of determination (R²).

Coffee Ring Effect

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CoffeeRingEffect
Type
Property
altLabel
coffee-ring strain

A property denoting non-uniform ring-like deposition pattern after droplet evaporation; suppressed by co-solvent and viscosity control.

Cold Start Survival Time

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ColdStartSurvivalTime
Type
Property
altLabel
survival time; start-up time

A property denoting duration until cold-start failure (voltage < 0.1 V) at sub-zero temperature.

Color Difference Delta Eab

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ColorDifferenceDeltaEab
Type
Property
altLabel
ΔEab*; ΔE; color difference

A property denoting color difference delta eab and determined in Xrite Optical Property Measurement.

Compressive Strength

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CompressiveStrength
Type
Property
altLabel
strength (MPa); strength at break

A property denoting maximum compressive strength of lattice under uniaxial compression.

Contact Angle

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ContactAngle
Type
Property
altLabel
water contact angle; initial contact angle; droplet contact angle

A property denoting static water contact angle on CCM surface; used as hydrophobicity indicator.

Contact Angle Decrease 0 to 200 s

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ContactAngleDecrease_0to200s
Type
Property

Coulombic Efficiency

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CoulombicEfficiency
Type
Property
altLabel
CE; Coulombic efficiency (average); MFC-CICo

A property denoting coulombic efficiency of full ORFB cell during galvanostatic cycling (discharge capacity / charge capacity).

Coverage Relaxation Rate Constant

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CoverageRelaxationRateConstant
Type
Property
altLabel
tau^-1; τ−1; inverse of coverage relaxation time

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CPEAdmittanceY0
Type
Property
altLabel
Y0; Yo; CPE1

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CPEExponentN
Type
Property
altLabel
CPE exponent; n (CPE exponent)

Type
Property
altLabel
aspect ratio of cracks

A property denoting crack aspect ratio and determined in Crack Characterization Measurement.

Crack Connectivity

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CrackConnectivity
Type
Property
altLabel
fully penetrating cracks

A property denoting proposed_new_term. paper_context: Percentage of CL cracks that fully penetrate thickness (pathway connectivity).

Crack Density

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CrackDensity
Type
Property
altLabel
surface crack density; areal density of cracks; crack areal density

A property denoting crack density and determined in Crack Characterization Measurement.

Crack Length

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CrackLength
Type
Property

A property denoting characteristic crack length scale observed in SEM images.

Crack Volume Accessibility At 20 um

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CrackVolumeAccessibilityAt20um
Type
Property

A property denoting proposed_new_term. paper_context: Fraction (%) of crack volume accessible from membrane/CL interface to a 20 µm sphere (simulated MIP).

Crack Width

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CrackWidth
Type
Property

A property denoting characteristic crack width scale observed in SEM images.

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CrackWidthD50_CWD
Type
Property
altLabel
d50(CWD); median crack width; mean crack width (Table 1)

A property denoting proposed_new_term. paper_context: Median crack width from crack width distribution (CWD) analysis.

Crack Width D 50 MIP

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CrackWidthD50_MIP
Type
Property
altLabel
d50(MIP); median accessible crack width

A property denoting proposed_new_term. paper_context: Median crack size from simulated mercury intrusion porosimetry (MIP).

Crack Width Max

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CrackWidthMax
Type
Property
altLabel
cracks width up to; maximum crack width

A property denoting proposed_new_term. paper_context: Maximum observed crack width in CL (from XTM slice analysis).

Crawler Speed

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CrawlerSpeed
Type
Property
altLabel
mm/min; crawl speed

A property denoting speed of LCE-based crawler during thermal cycling.

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CriticalCrackThickness
Type
Property
altLabel
CCT

A property denoting largest dried film thickness at which primary cracks (PCs) do not occur during drying.

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CrushStrength
Type
Property
altLabel
radial crush strength

A property denoting crush strength and determined in Crush Strength Measurement.

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CurrentDensity
Type
Property
altLabel
current flux density; j0; cell current density

A property denoting current density normalized to Geometric Area and determined in MEAPolarization, Rotating Ring Disk Voltammetry, and Cyclic Voltammetry.

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CurrentDensityDecayRate
Type
Property
altLabel
decay rate; degradation rate; current decay rate

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CurrentDensityLossPercent
Type
Property
altLabel
current loss %

A property denoting percent loss from Tafel-step analysis attributed to connectivity/specific adsorption effects.

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CurrentDensityPerPtSurfaceArea
Type
Property
altLabel
current density per catalytic surface; A·m_Pt^-2

Current Efficiency

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CurrentEfficiency
Type
Property
altLabel
cd/A; maximum current efficiency 0.85 cd/A

Property

current retention

Property

Property

Property

diffraction peak position; diffraction peak at 2θ; (002) peak position

Dimensional Expansion Percent

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#DimensionalExpansionPercent

Property

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#DischargeTime

Property
altLabel
t_discharge

Property

C=C conversion rate; double-bond conversion

Property
altLabel
Cdl; Ca; Cpd1

Double Layer Capacitance Ratio

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#DoubleLayerCapacitanceRatio
Type
Property

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#DoubleLayerCapacitiveCurrentDensity
Type
Property
altLabel
i_dl

Property
altLabel
sessile drop penetrates into membrane

Property

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#DurabilityWithoutCyclingHours

Property
altLabel
Durability without cycling; durability w/o cycling

Property

Type
Property
altLabel
proton conductivity (effective); effective proton conductivity; proton conductivity

A property denoting effective ionic conductivity and determined in Electrochemical Impedance Spectroscopy Potentiostatic, Proton Conductivity Measurement, and Literature Review Synthesis.

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#EffectiveOxygenDiffusionCoefficient
Type
Property
altLabel
oxygen diffusivity; Db; Dox

Efficiency Retention Percent

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#EfficiencyRetentionPercent

Property

Type
Property

Property

Electrocataystsupport stablity; electrocatalyst support stability

Property

Electrode Side Length

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ElectrodeSideLength
Type
Property

Property
altLabel
number of electrons; electrons transferred; n electrons transferred

A property denoting electron transfer number and determined in Rotating Ring Disk Voltammetry and Linear Sweep Voltammetry.

Property
altLabel
conductivity loss; loss in in-plane conductivity

A property denoting electronic conductivity loss percent and determined in Ex Situ Hydration Test.

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ElongationAtBreak

Property
altLabel
strain at break

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#EnergyEfficiency
Type
Property
altLabel
EE; energy efficiency (average)

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#EquivalentIonomerFilmThickness

Property

External Quantum Efficiency

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ExternalQuantumEfficiency
Type
Property

A property denoting external quantum efficiency and determined in Review Statement Extraction and External Quantum Efficiency Measurement.

F 1 s Atomic Percent

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#F1sAtomicPercent
Type
Property

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#FAMEContent
Type
Property
altLabel
ester content; biodiesel content; FAME

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#FeN4SiteDensity
Type
Property
altLabel
active site density; site density (SD)

A property denoting estimated density of Fe–N4 sites from N 1s XPS fitting (assumption: 399.5 eV component originates from Fe–N4).

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#FerritinCavityDiameter
Type
Property
altLabel
cavity diameter

A property denoting ferritin cavity diameter.

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#FerritinIronIonCapacity
Type
Property
altLabel
up to 4500 iron ions; iron ions per ferritin

A property denoting maximum number of iron ions stored in ferritin cavity (count).

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#FiberOrientationAngleStdDev
Type
Property
altLabel
fiber angle standard deviation; fiber angle std dev

A property denoting standard deviation (degrees) of fiber orientation angle distribution measured from XCT images.

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#FilamentDeflection
Type
Property
altLabel
midspan deflection

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#FillFactor

Property
altLabel
FF

Type
Property
altLabel
pattern thickness; flake thickness; bi-layer thickness

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#FittedResistanceFromPolarizationCurve
Type
Property

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#FlexuralStrength
Type
Property
altLabel

A property denoting flexural strength of pyrolyzed bars measured in three-point bending (MPa).

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#FluorineWeightPercentInCatalystLayer
Type
Property
altLabel
F

A property denoting eDS-reported normalized fluorine concentration in catalyst layer (wt.%); F attributed to PFSA/Nafion.

Freeze Thaw Cycle Count

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#FreezeThawCycleCount
Type
Property
altLabel
freeze-thaw cycles

A property denoting number of repeated freeze–thaw cycles applied during subzero durability test.

Furfural Conversion

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#FurfuralConversion
Type
Property

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#FurfurylAlcoholSelectivity
Type
Property
altLabel

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#Gloss
Type
Property
altLabel
GU

A property denoting gloss and determined in Gloss Measurement.

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#GrainSize
Type
Property
altLabel
crystallite size; La; Lc

A property denoting characteristic grain/crystallite size estimated from XRD using Scherrer formula (reported ~5 nm for β-SiC at 1600°C).

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#GrapheneFewLayerFraction
Type
Property
altLabel
few-layer fraction (2–10 layers); few-layer fraction

A property denoting fraction of analyzed flakes that are few-layer graphene.

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#GrapheneFlakeLateralSize
Type
Property
altLabel
lateral size (µm); flake size; lateral size

A property denoting lateral size of graphene flakes (reported range 0.5–15 µm for sawdust-derived graphene).

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#GrapheneFlakeThickness
Type
Property
altLabel
monolayer thickness

A property denoting thickness of individual graphene flakes from AFM (typically ~1 nm for monolayer).

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#GrapheneFlakeYield
Type
Property
altLabel
yield (wt%)

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#GrapheneLayerStepHeight

Property
altLabel
step height

A property denoting aFM step height per graphene layer (approx. 0.37 nm).

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#GrapheneMonolayerFraction
Type
Property
altLabel
monolayer fraction

A property denoting fraction of analyzed flakes that are monolayer graphene.

Graphitic Carbon Fraction Percent

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#GraphiticCarbonFractionPercent
Type
Property
altLabel
Cgr

A property denoting percent contribution of graphitic/aliphatic carbon component in C 1s XPS deconvolution.

Graphitic Crystallite Size La

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#GraphiticCrystalliteSizeLa
Type
Property
altLabel
La; crystallite size La; in-plane crystallite size

A property denoting graphitic crystallite size la and determined in Raman Spectroscopy Measurement.

Graphitic Crystallite Stacking Size Lc

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#GraphiticCrystalliteStackingSizeLc
Type
Property
altLabel
Lc; crystallite stacking size

A property denoting graphitic crystallite stacking size lc and determined in X Ray Diffraction Measurement.

Graphitic Nitrogen Fraction Percent

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#GraphiticNitrogenFractionPercent
Type
Property
altLabel
Ngr; graphitic N

A property denoting percent of N 1s assigned to graphitic nitrogen (XPS deconvolution).

Graphitic Plane Orientation Order Parameter

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#GraphiticPlaneOrientationOrderParameter
Type
Property
altLabel
order parameter

A property denoting graphitic plane orientation order parameter and determined in X Ray Diffraction Measurement.

Graphitic Planes Per Crystallite

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#GraphiticPlanesPerCrystallite
Type
Property
altLabel
Lc/d(002); planes per crystallite

A property denoting graphitic planes per crystallite and determined in X Ray Diffraction Measurement.

Gravimetric Specific Capacitance

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#GravimetricSpecificCapacitance
Type
Property
altLabel
specific capacitance; capacitance (F g^-1); specific capacitance (F g−1)

A property denoting gravimetric specific capacitance (F/g) measured for OP-AC in 0.1 M H2SO4 from CV curves; distinct from area-specific double-layer capacitance.

Guinier Porod Dimension Variable

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#GuinierPorodDimensionVariable
Type
Property
altLabel
dimension variable (Guinier–Porod); dimension variable

A property denoting dimension/shape variable from Guinier–Porod model fitting indicating aggregate dimensionality (globular vs rodlike); reported ~0.01.

H 2 Desorption Peak Integral Current Density

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#H2DesorptionPeakIntegralCurrentDensity
Type
Property
altLabel
H2 desorption peak area; H2 desorption peak integral

A property denoting authors report anode 'ECSA' in units of mA·V·cm^-2 from H2 desorption peak integration; likely proportional to charge density (needs curation).

Half Wave Potential

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#HalfWavePotential
Type
Property
altLabel
E1/2

A property denoting potential at which current reaches half of limiting value in ORR LSV (RDE).

Half Wave Potential Shift After ADT

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#HalfWavePotentialShiftAfterADT
Type
Property
altLabel
negative shift in half-wave potentials; E1/2 shift after 3000 cycles; half-wave potential shift

A property denoting change in HalfWavePotential after accelerated durability test (ADT) potential cycling; reported here as mV shift.

Half Wave Potential Shift Relative To Nafion

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#HalfWavePotentialShiftRelativeToNafion
Type
Property
altLabel
positive shift of half-wave potential; E1/2 shift vs Nafion; half-wave potential shift

A property denoting half wave potential shift relative to nafion and determined in Accelerated Stress Test Voltage Cycling.

Hall Mobility

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#HallMobility
Type
Property

A property denoting carrier Hall mobility measured by Hall system on graphene film/pellet.

Hamaker Constant

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#HamakerConstant
Type
Property
altLabel
Hamaker coefficient; Hamaker coefficient A

A property denoting hamaker constant used for van der Waals interaction energy in DLVO-type model.

Hansen Solubility Parameter Dispersion

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#HansenSolubilityParameterDispersion
Type
Property
altLabel
δD

A property denoting hansen solubility parameter (dispersion component) in MPa^0.5.

Hansen Solubility Parameter Hydrogen Bonding

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#HansenSolubilityParameterHydrogenBonding
Type
Property

A property denoting hansen solubility parameter (hydrogen-bonding component) in MPa^0.5.

Hansen Solubility Parameter Polar

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#HansenSolubilityParameterPolar
Type
Property

A property denoting hansen solubility parameter (polar component) in MPa^0.5.

High Frequency Resistance

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#HighFrequencyResistance
Type
Property
altLabel
HFR; ohmic resistance; single cell resistance

A property denoting ohmic/HFR concept in RQ (discussed conceptually).

Homogenization Temperature

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#HomogenizationTemperature_2
Type
Property
altLabel
homogenization achieved

A property denoting homogenization temperature.

Hydration Number Lambda

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#HydrationNumberLambda
Type
Property
altLabel
hydration number Î»

A property denoting hydration number lambda and determined in Membrane Swelling Measurement.

Hydrodynamic Diameter

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#HydrodynamicDiameter
Type
Property
altLabel
hydrodynamic diameter (DLS); D_h; average aggregate diameter

A property denoting the hydrodynamic diameter of dispersed particles or aggregates as determined by dynamic light scattering.

Hydrodynamic Radius

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#HydrodynamicRadius
Type
Property
altLabel
hydrodynamic radius (DLS); R_h; hydrodynamic radius distribution

A property denoting hydrodynamic radius of ionomer/catalyst aggregates measured by dynamic light scattering.

Hydrogen Bonding Energy

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#HydrogenBondingEnergy
Type
Property
altLabel
EH-bonding; H-bonding energy

A property denoting computed hydrogen-bonding energy between polymer and phosphoric acid (DFT).

Hydrogen Crossover Current Density

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#HydrogenCrossoverCurrentDensity
Type
Property
altLabel
hydrogen crossover limiting current; crossover current density; H2 crossover current density

A property denoting limiting current density measured by LSV under H2/N2 to quantify hydrogen crossover flux.

Hydrogen Permeability

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#HydrogenPermeability
Type
Property
altLabel
H2 permeability; H₂ permeability

A property denoting gas permeability of polymer film to H2 (Barrer).

Hydrogen Uptake Per Furfural

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#HydrogenUptakePerFurfural
Type
Property
altLabel
absorbed hydrogen (mol H2/mol furfural); mol H2/mol furfural

A property denoting stoichiometric H2 consumed per mol furfural during reaction (from flow-meter normalization).

Hydrolysis Rate

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#HydrolysisRate
Type
Property

A property denoting hydrolysis rate through membrane during conversion of sulfonyl fluoride to sulfonic acid groups.

Impedance Modulus Slope K

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ImpedanceModulusSlopeK
Type
Property
altLabel
K; Z

A property denoting impedance modulus slope K and determined in Electrochemical Impedance Spectroscopy Potentiostatic.

In Plane Electronic Conductivity

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#InPlaneElectronicConductivity
Type
Property
altLabel
σ_cl; electrical conductivity; Catalyst support Electornic conductivity

A property denoting in plane electronic conductivity and determined in Four Probe Resistance Measurement, Review Statement Extraction, and In Plane Electronic Conductivity Measurement.

Incident Photon To Current Efficiency

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#IncidentPhotonToCurrentEfficiency
Type
Property
altLabel
IPCE

A property denoting incident photon-to-current conversion efficiency (spectral quantum efficiency) of DSSC.

Inductance L

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#InductanceL
Type
Property

A property denoting inductance L and determined in Electrochemical Impedance Spectroscopy Potentiostatic.

Initial Catalytic Activity Loss Percent

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#InitialCatalyticActivityLossPercent
Type
Property
altLabel
Loss in initialcataytio activity; loss in initial catalytic activity

A property denoting initial catalytic activity loss percent and determined in Review Statement Extraction.

Ink Stability Time

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#InkStabilityTime
Type
Property
altLabel
stability time; settling time; phase separation time

A property denoting time until visible phase separation/settling (experimental) or until threshold aggregate size (model).

Ink Storage Stability Duration

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#InkStorageStabilityDuration
Type
Property
altLabel
ink stability; storage stability; ink stability duration

A property denoting ink storage stability duration and determined in Review Statement Extraction.

Inter Agglomerate Pore Size

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#InterAgglomeratePoreSize
Type
Property
altLabel
secondary pore size; pore size; average pore size

A property denoting inter agglomerate pore size and determined in Literature Microstructure Compilation, X Ray Computed Tomography Imaging, and Mercury Intrusion Porosimetry Measurement.

Inter Crystallite Distance

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#InterCrystalliteDistance
Type
Property
altLabel
ID; inter-particle distance

A property denoting inter crystallite distance and determined in Reported Material Property.

Interdiffusion Onset Temperature

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#InterdiffusionOnsetTemperature
Type
Property

A property denoting temperature at which interdiffusion between metallic phases is first observed (e.g., Fe-Ni interdiffusion forming fcc-(Fe,Ni)).

Interfacial Resistance

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#InterfacialResistance
Type
Property
altLabel
R_interfacial; dissolution resistance; gas–ionomer interface resistance

A property denoting interfacial resistance.

Interlayer Spacing

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#InterlayerSpacing
Type
Property
altLabel
d-spacing; d(002); d003

A property denoting crystallographic interlayer spacing measured from HR-TEM lattice fringes.

Intermediate Relaxation Resistance R 0

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#IntermediateRelaxationResistanceR0
Type
Property
altLabel
R0

A property denoting intermediate relaxation resistance R 0 and determined in Electrochemical Impedance Spectroscopy Potentiostatic.

Internal Current Density

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#InternalCurrentDensity
Type
Property
altLabel
i_n

A property denoting internal current density term in Eq. (1) polarization curve model.

Interplanar Lattice Spacing

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#InterplanarLatticeSpacing
Type
Property
altLabel
interplanar spacing; lattice spacing

A property denoting interplanar lattice spacing measured from HRTEM (e.g., ~0.2 nm for Pd (200) planes).

Interplanar Spacing

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#InterplanarSpacing
Type
Property
altLabel
d-spacing

A property denoting interplanar spacing (e.g., d(002)) measured from HRTEM or XRD.

Iodine Value

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#IodineValue
Type
Property

A property denoting iodine value and determined in Iodine Value Measurement.

Ionic Resistance

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#IonicResistance
Type
Property
altLabel
Ri; ionic resistance of catalyst layer; Re

A property denoting catalyst-layer ionic resistance derived from high-frequency impedance analysis at low current density.

Ionomer Adsorption Capacity Per Mass

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#IonomerAdsorptionCapacityPerMass
Type
Property
altLabel
Γmax; maximum adsorption capacity (mg/mg)

A property denoting maximum first-layer Nafion adsorption per substrate mass from Langmuir fit.

Ionomer Adsorption Capacity Per Surface Area

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#IonomerAdsorptionCapacityPerSurfaceArea
Type
Property
altLabel
Γ'max; maximum adsorption per unit surface area (mg/m²)

A property denoting maximum first-layer Nafion adsorption normalized by BET surface area.

Ionomer Adsorption Rate On Pt Carbon

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#IonomerAdsorptionRateOnPtCarbon
Type
Property
altLabel
adsorption rate of ionomer on Pt/carbon

A property denoting ionomer adsorption rate on pt carbon and determined in Ionomer Adsorption Rate Measurement.

Ionomer Adsorption Ratio

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#IonomerAdsorptionRatio
Type
Property
altLabel
adsorption ratio; I (ionomer adsorption ratio); ionomer adsorption

A property denoting dimensionless ratio of ionomers adsorbed on Pt/C: Γ = (Cp0 - Cp)/Cp0 (Eq. 2).

Ionomer Aggregate Diameter

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#IonomerAggregateDiameter
Type
Property
altLabel
aggregate diameter; ionomer aggregate size; cylindrical ionomer diameter

A property denoting ionomer aggregate diameter and determined in Molecular Dynamics Simulation.

Ionomer Aggregate Size Ratio

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#IonomerAggregateSizeRatio
Type
Property
altLabel
aggregate size ratio

A property denoting dimensionless ratio comparing ionomer aggregate sizes between two solvent conditions (e.g., water vs dipropylene glycol).

Ionomer Connected Electrochemically Active Surface Area

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#IonomerConnectedElectrochemicallyActiveSurfaceArea
Type
Property
altLabel
ECSA_ionomer; ionomer connected ECSA; Pt surface in contact with ionomer

A property denoting ionomer connected electrochemically active surface area and determined in Carbon Monoxide Stripping Voltammetry.

Ionomer Coverage On Carbon

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#IonomerCoverageOnCarbon
Type
Property
altLabel
ionomer coverage on C

A property denoting fraction/percent of carbon surface covered by ionomer inferred from EIS double-layer capacitance with CO blocking.

Ionomer Coverage On Platinum

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#IonomerCoverageOnPlatinum
Type
Property
altLabel
ionomer coverage on Pt

A property denoting fraction/percent of Pt surface covered by ionomer inferred from EIS double-layer capacitance with CO blocking.

Ionomer Film Oxygen Transport Resistivity

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#IonomerFilmOxygenTransportResistivity
Type
Property
altLabel
oxygen transport resistivity; R_N; ionomer film O2 transport resistivity

A property denoting ionomer film O2 transport resistivity (units s cm^-1) defined in Nomenclature and computed via single-pore model (Eq. for \mathcal{R}_N).

Ionomer Film Thickness

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#IonomerFilmThickness
Type
Property
altLabel
ionomer layer thickness; lN; Nafion film thickness

A property denoting thickness of ionomer film covering catalyst particles or supports (nm scale).

Ionomer Inter Particle Distance

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#IonomerInterParticleDistance
Type
Property
altLabel
Nafion ionomer inter-NP distance; interparticle distance (d); inter-NP distance

A property denoting mean interparticle distance between PFSA ionomer nanoparticles estimated from the SANS correlation peak (d=2π/q).

Ionomer Mass Fractal Radius Of Gyration

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#IonomerMassFractalRadiusOfGyration
Type
Property
altLabel
Rg of ionomer mass fractal; Rg of Nafon ionomer mass fractal in

A property denoting radius of gyration (Rg) of the ionomer mass-fractal structure forming the shell/percolating through carbon aggregates (carbon contrast-match).

Ionomer Nanoparticle Height

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#IonomerNanoparticleHeight
Type
Property
altLabel
cylindrical particle height

A property denoting ionomer nanoparticle height and determined in Contrast Variation SANSUSANS Measurement.

Ionomer Nanoparticle Radius

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#IonomerNanoparticleRadius
Type
Property
altLabel
radius of Nafion ionomer NPs; cylinder radius; radius of Nafion ionomer NPs (nm)

A property denoting radius of rodlike (cylindrical) PFSA ionomer nanoparticles estimated from SANS cylinder model fits.

Ionomer Oxygen Transport Resistance Component

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#IonomerOxygenTransportResistanceComponent
Type
Property
altLabel
R_ionomer; ionomer film oxygen transport component; film transport component

A property denoting ionomer-related contribution to pressure-independent transport resistance.

Ionomer Patch Surface Coverage

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#IonomerPatchSurfaceCoverage
Type
Property
altLabel
ionomer patch coverage; fractional ionomer coverage; ionomer coverage

A property denoting fraction of catalyst-layer surface covered by ionomer patches (estimated from SEM images).

Ionomer Thin Film Permeability

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#IonomerThinFilmPermeability
Type
Property
altLabel
Π_ionomer; gas permeability of ionomer film

A property denoting ionomer thin film permeability.

IRSO 3 Stretching Peak Wavenumber

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#IRSO3StretchingPeakWavenumber
Type
Property

A property denoting fTIR wavenumber position of Nafion sulfonate (-SO3-) asymmetric stretching peak.

Kinetic Current

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#KineticCurrent
Type
Property
altLabel
kinetic current density; j_k; i_k

A property denoting kinetic current normalized to Geometric Area and determined in Rotating Ring Disk Voltammetry and Linear Sweep Voltammetry.

Knudsen Diffusivity

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#KnudsenDiffusivity
Type
Property
altLabel
Dik

A property denoting Knudsen diffusion coefficient of O2 in pores used in Bosanquet equation (cm2/s).

Knudsen Oxygen Transport Resistance Component

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#KnudsenOxygenTransportResistanceComponent
Type
Property
altLabel
R_Knudsen; void pore oxygen transport resistance; Knudsen resistance

A property denoting knudsen diffusion-related contribution to pressure-independent transport resistance.

Langmuir Adsorption Constant

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#LangmuirAdsorptionConstant
Type
Property
altLabel
KL; Langmuir constant; equilibrium adsorption constant

A property denoting first-layer Langmuir adsorption equilibrium constant from adsorption isotherm fits; unit not explicitly stated in paper.

Large Pore Fraction Above 150 nm

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#LargePoreFractionAbove150nm
Type
Property

A property denoting large pore fraction above 150 nm and determined in FIBSEM Tomography Measurement.

Lateral Electronic Resistance

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#LateralElectronicResistance
Type
Property
altLabel
electronic resistance; four-probe resistance; lateral resistance

A property denoting in-plane/lateral electronic resistance of dry catalyst layer measured by four-probe I–V method (Ohm).

Lattice Distortion Percent

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#LatticeDistortionPercent
Type
Property
altLabel
lattice distortion; lattice parameter distortion

A property denoting lattice distortion percent.

Lattice Parameter

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#LatticeParameter
Type
Property
altLabel
lattice constant a; fcc lattice parameter; lattice parameter a

A property denoting fCC lattice parameter determined from XRD peak positions.

Lattice Structure Size

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#LatticeStructureSize
Type
Property
altLabel
structure size; grid size

A property denoting macroscopic dimensions of printed/sintered grid structures (e.g., 15×15 mm before; 11.54×11.62 mm after).

Ligand Density Weight Percent

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#LigandDensityWeightPercent
Type
Property
altLabel
total ligand density; ligand density (wt%); total ligand density of MSA capped QD

A property denoting ligand mass fraction on QDs inferred from TGA weight loss.

Limit Of Linearity Strain

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#LimitOfLinearityStrain
Type
Property
altLabel
γ0; limit strain of linearity; limit of linearity

A property denoting strain amplitude where G′ deviates by >10% from plateau value (linear viscoelastic limit).

Limiting Current Density

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#LimitingCurrentDensity
Type
Property
altLabel
limiting current; i_L; i_lim

A property denoting limiting current density normalized to Geometric Area and determined in Oxygen Gain/Loss Measurement, Rotating Ring Disk Voltammetry, and Linear Sweep Voltammetry.

Limiting Current Density Loss Percent

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#LimitingCurrentDensityLossPercent
Type
Property
altLabel
limiting current density decrease (%)

A property denoting relative decrease (%) in limiting current density compared with ideal interface contact (e.g., due to MPL/CL interfacial voids).

Limiting Current Density Loss Percent After ADT

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#LimitingCurrentDensityLossPercentAfterADT
Type
Property
altLabel
loss in diffusion limiting current density; limiting current density loss

A property denoting percent loss in LimitingCurrentDensity after ADT potential cycling.

Linear Shrinkage

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#LinearShrinkage
Type
Property

A property denoting linear shrinkage and determined in X Ray Computed Tomography Measurement.

Linear Shrinkage Height

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#LinearShrinkageHeight
Type
Property
altLabel
shrinkage in height direction

A property denoting linear shrinkage (%) in specimen height from as-cured to pyrolyzed.

Linear Shrinkage Length

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#LinearShrinkageLength
Type
Property
altLabel
shrinkage in length direction

A property denoting linear shrinkage (%) in specimen length from as-cured to pyrolyzed.

Linear Shrinkage Width

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#LinearShrinkageWidth
Type
Property
altLabel
shrinkage in width direction

A property denoting linear shrinkage (%) in specimen width from as-cured to pyrolyzed.

Linoleic Acid Mass Fraction

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#LinoleicAcidMassFraction
Type
Property
altLabel
Linoleic fatty acid%

A property denoting linoleic acid mass fraction and determined in Gas Chromatography Measurement.

Linolenic Acid Mass Fraction

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#LinolenicAcidMassFraction
Type
Property
altLabel
Linolenic fatty acid%

A property denoting linolenic acid mass fraction and determined in Gas Chromatography Measurement.

Local Gas Transport Resistance

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#LocalGasTransportResistance
Type
Property
altLabel
R_Local; local transport resistance; local mass transport resistance

A property denoting local gas transport resistance normalized to Geometric Area and determined in Oxygen Gain/Loss Measurement and Limiting Current Measurement.

Local Oxygen Transport Resistance

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#LocalOxygenTransportResistance
Type
Property
altLabel
local O2 diffusion resistance at Pt sites; pressure-independent O2 resistance; local O2 diffusion resistance

A property denoting local oxygen transport resistance normalized to Geometric Area and determined in Oxygen Gain/Loss Measurement, O2–N2 Switching Measurement, and Through-Plane Gas Transport Measurement.

Loss Modulus

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#LossModulus
Type
Property
altLabel
G''; viscous modulus; loss modulus G″

A property denoting loss modulus (G″) characterizing ink viscous dissipation under oscillatory shear.

Low Activity Pt Particle Fraction

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#LowActivityPtParticleFraction
Type
Property
altLabel
fraction of Pt particles with low activity; fraction of Pt particles (low activity)

A property denoting fraction of Pt particles in a specified low current-density interval (paper reports 41% in 200–800 A·m_Pt^-2 for structure 2).

Macropore Diameter

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#MacroporeDiameter
Type
Property
altLabel
macropores; macropore size

A property denoting macropore diameter and determined in Mercury Intrusion Porosimetry Measurement.

Macropore Volume Per Mass

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#MacroporeVolumePerMass
Type
Property
altLabel
macropore volume

A property denoting macropore volume of carbon xerogel normalized by mass (cm³ g⁻¹).

Manufacturing Throughput Increase Factor

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ManufacturingThroughputIncreaseFactor
Type
Property
altLabel
throughput increase factor; throughput increase

A property denoting relative throughput factor (e.g., roll-to-roll vs lab spray); not present as named Property in ontology.

Mass Activity

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#MassActivity
Type
Property
altLabel
i_m; ORR mass activity; A/mg_PGM

A property denoting mass activity and determined in MEAPolarization, Rotating Ring Disk Voltammetry, and Linear Sweep Voltammetry.

Mass Activity Loss Percent

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#MassActivityLossPercent
Type
Property
altLabel
Mass activity loss

A property denoting percent loss of mass activity (durability metric).

Mass Fractal Dimension

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#MassFractalDimension
Type
Property
altLabel
d_f; fractal dimension; catalyst ink (nm) fractal dimension

A property denoting mass fractal dimension from low-q USAXS power-law scaling; higher indicates greater agglomeration.

Mass Loss Fraction

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#MassLossFraction
Type
Property
altLabel
mass loss

A property denoting fractional mass loss during pyrolysis (reported ~30% mass loss in conclusions).

Mass To Charge Ratio

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#MassToChargeRatio
Type
Property
altLabel
m/z

A property denoting mass to charge ratio and determined in Gas Chromatography Mass Spectrometry Measurement.

Mass Transport Loss Parameter M

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#MassTransportLossParameterM
Type
Property
altLabel
m parameter; m (V)

A property denoting empirical mass-transport loss parameter m in Eq. (1): m*exp(n*i).

Mass Transport Loss Parameter N

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#MassTransportLossParameterN
Type
Property
altLabel
n parameter; n (cm2/mA)

A property denoting empirical mass-transport loss parameter n in Eq. (1): m*exp(n*i).

Mass Transport Resistance

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#MassTransportResistance
Type
Property
altLabel
molecular diffusion resistance (secondary pores); pressure-dependent O2 resistance; molecular diffusion resistance

A property denoting mass transport resistance normalized to Geometric Area and determined in Through-Plane Gas Transport Measurement, MEAPolarization, and Electrochemical Impedance Spectroscopy Potentiostatic.

Mass Transport Resistance Increase Due To Local Percent

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#MassTransportResistanceIncreaseDueToLocalPercent
Type
Property
altLabel
share attributed to local resistance

A property denoting mass transport resistance increase due to local percent.

Mass Transport Resistance Increase Percent

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#MassTransportResistanceIncreasePercent
Type
Property
altLabel
increase in total mass transport resistance; % increase

A property denoting mass transport resistance increase percent.

Mass Transport Resistance Reduction Percent

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#MassTransportResistanceReductionPercent
Type
Property

A property denoting percent reduction in fitted mass transport resistance relative to comparator (E-spun vs E-sprayed).

Max Adsorption Volume Nitrogen

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#MaxAdsorptionVolumeNitrogen
Type
Property
altLabel
maximum adsorption volume (N2)

A property denoting maximum N2 adsorption volume (proxy for pore volume).

Max Adsorption Volume Water

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#MaxAdsorptionVolumeWater
Type
Property
altLabel
maximum adsorption volume (H2O)

A property denoting max adsorption volume water.

Maximum Current Density

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#MaximumCurrentDensity
Type
Property
altLabel
short circuit current density; max current density

A property denoting maximum current density and determined in MEAPolarization, Microbial Fuel Cell Polarization Measurement, and Fuel Cell Polarization Measurement.

Maximum Reduction Conversion Rate

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#MaximumReductionConversionRate
Type
Property
altLabel
maximum conversion rate; %/K

A property denoting maximum rate of oxide-to-metal conversion derived from normalized XRD peak intensity change (units %/K).

Mean Absolute Percentage Error

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#MeanAbsolutePercentageError
Type
Property
altLabel
MAPE

A property denoting prediction performance metric: mean absolute percentage error between measured and predicted voltage.

Mean Fiber Orientation Angle

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#MeanFiberOrientationAngle
Type
Property
altLabel
average fiber angle; fiber alignment angle

A property denoting mean fiber orientation angle (degrees) measured from XCT images relative to print direction.

Mean Flow Pore Diameter

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#MeanFlowPoreDiameter
Type
Property

A property denoting mean flow pore diameter and determined in Mercury Intrusion Porosimetry Measurement.

Mean Particle Size

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#MeanParticleSize
Type
Property
altLabel
particle size; average particle size; aggregate size

A property denoting mean particle size of carbon xerogel powder after grinding, from laser diffraction.

Membrane Area Expansion Percent

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#MembraneAreaExpansionPercent
Type
Property
altLabel
membrane area expansion

A property denoting membrane area expansion percent and determined in Membrane Swelling Measurement and Membrane Area Expansion Measurement.

Membrane Bulk Resistance

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#MembraneBulkResistance
Type
Property
altLabel
bulk resistance; Rb

A property denoting bulk resistance of membrane/electrolyte from AC impedance with blocking electrodes (ohm).

Membrane Volume Expansion Percent

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#MembraneVolumeExpansionPercent
Type
Property

A property denoting percent change in membrane volume after PA doping.

Mesopore Volume

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#MesoporeVolume
Type
Property

A property denoting pore volume attributed to mesopores (>2 nm in cited convention); reported/compared in cm^3/g.

Metal Atomic Percent

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#MetalAtomicPercent
Type
Property
altLabel
Metal %

A property denoting atomic percent of transition metal from XPS survey/high-resolution spectra (as reported).

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#MetalCoordinatedNitrogenFractionPercent
Type
Property
altLabel
Nx-M; nitrogen coordinated with metal

A property denoting percent of N 1s assigned to nitrogen coordinated to metal (Nx-M).

Metal Nx Fraction Percent

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#MetalNxFractionPercent
Type
Property
altLabel
M-Nx; metal-nitrogen coordination fraction

A property denoting fraction/percent of metal present as M-Nx coordinated species (as reported).

Metal Oxide Fraction Percent

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#MetalOxideFractionPercent
Type
Property
altLabel
MOx; metal oxides fraction

A property denoting fraction/percent of metal present as metal oxides (as reported).

Metallic Metal Fraction Percent

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#MetallicMetalFractionPercent
Type
Property
altLabel
Metal; metallic particles fraction

A property denoting fraction/percent of metal present as metallic species in XPS metal spectrum fitting (as reported).

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#MethaneConversion
Type
Property
altLabel
CH4 conversion; X_CH4

A property denoting methane conversion and determined in Dry Reforming Of Methane Performance Measurement.

Type
Property
altLabel
P

A property denoting methanol permeability and determined in Methanol Permeability Measurement.

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#MgContentWt
Type
Property
altLabel
Mg content; wt.% Mg

A property denoting magnesium weight percent in LDH (from ICP-AES).

Type
Property

A property denoting diameter of printed/sintered microfilament.

Type
Property
altLabel
µm-scale pores max

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#MicroporeSizeMin
Type
Property
altLabel
µm-scale pores min

A property denoting lower bound of reported µm-scale pore size tunability range (10–20 µm).

Micropore Surface Area

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#MicroporeSurfaceArea
Type
Property

A property denoting micropore surface area and determined in Literature Review Synthesis.

Micropore Volume

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#MicroporeVolume
Type
Property

A property denoting pore volume attributed to micropores (<2 nm in cited convention); reported/compared in cm^3/g.

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#MicroporousLayerThickness

Property

Property

Smay et al. Eq. (1) requirement

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ModelFitR2
Type
Property

R2; R²

Property

Dij; binary diffusivity in air; molecular diffusivity

Molecular Weight

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#MolecularWeight
Type
Property
altLabel
Mw; PBI molecular weight; PEG molecular weight

A property denoting molecular weight and determined in Material Specification Measurement and Gel Permeation Chromatography Measurement.

Monomer Conversion

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#MonomerConversion
Type
Property

A property denoting fractional conversion of monomers during polymerization estimated from UV–vis.

N 1 s Atomic Percent

Property

N-contents; N atomic percent; nitrogen atomic percent

Property

Property

CO stripping peak position; stripping potential; CO stripping peak potential

Property

Epp

Property

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PhotoluminescenceQuantumYield

Property
altLabel
quantum yield; QY; absolute quantum yield

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PhysicalSurfaceAreaPtCatalyst
Type
Property

Pt physical surface area; physical surface area; Pt catalytic surface area

Pillar Height

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PillarHeight
Type
Property

Plasmon Peak Wavelength

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PlasmonPeakWavelength
Type
Property

Property

G0″

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PlateauStorageModulus
Type
Property
altLabel
G0′

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PlatinumWeightPercentInCatalyst
Type
Property

Type
Property
altLabel
Pt
