Type
Property
altLabel
Rp

A property denoting resistance associated with polarization (semi-circle diameter / fitted circuit), includes charge transfer and diffusion contributions per authors.

Polydispersity Index

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PolydispersityIndex
Type
Property
altLabel
PDI; PD index; Mw/Mn

A property denoting dimensionless index from DLS describing breadth of size distribution; not present as named Property in ontology.

Polymer Mass Loss

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PolymerMassLoss
Type
Property
altLabel
mass loss (TGA); mass loss; weight loss

A property denoting mass loss attributed to grafted polymer decomposition in TGA.

Polymer P Ka

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PolymerPKa
Type
Property
altLabel
pKa

A property denoting acid dissociation constant (pKa) of polymer functional group (dimensionless).

Pore Area Fraction

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PoreAreaFraction
Type
Property
altLabel
pore area %; crack area fraction

A property denoting area fraction (%) of pores on fracture surface (2D measurement).

Pore Major Axis

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PoreMajorAxis
Type
Property

A property denoting average major axis length of pores measured on fracture surfaces (µm).

Pore Minor Axis

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PoreMinorAxis
Type
Property

A property denoting average minor axis length of pores measured on fracture surfaces (µm).

Pore Size Distribution

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PoreSizeDistribution
Type
Property
altLabel
PSD

A property denoting the distribution of pore sizes within a material or structure as determined by pore-characterization measurements.

Pore Size Distribution Peak Diameter

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PoreSizeDistributionPeakDiameter
Type
Property
altLabel
pore size distribution peak; pore diameter peak; peak diameter

A property denoting peak pore diameter(s) read from pore size distribution (PSD) derived from N2 desorption (NLDFT).

Pore Surface Area Fraction Below 20 nm

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PoreSurfaceAreaFractionBelow20nm
Type
Property

A property denoting pore surface area fraction below 20 nm and determined in Nitrogen Physisorption Measurement.

Potential Of Total Zero Charge

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PotentialOfTotalZeroCharge
Type
Property
altLabel
ptzc

A property denoting electrode potential where surface charge is zero; review cites ptzc for Pt(111) affecting ionomer adsorption.

Power Conversion Efficiency

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PowerConversionEfficiency
Type
Property
altLabel
PCE; device efficiency; conversion efficiency

A property denoting solar-cell power conversion efficiency (output electrical power / incident light power).

Power Density

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PowerDensity
Type
Property
altLabel
Pmax; peak power density; maximum output density

A property denoting power density normalized to Catalyst Mass and determined in MEAPolarization, Electrochemical Reaction Simulation, and Organic Flow Battery Polarization Measurement.

Power Density Increase Percent

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PowerDensityIncreasePercent
Type
Property
altLabel
power density increase; % increase of maximum power density; % increase

A property denoting power density increase percent and determined in MEAPolarization and Fuel Cell Polarization Measurement.

Power Efficiency

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PowerEfficiency
Type
Property
altLabel
lm/W; maximum power efficiency 1.03 lm/W

A property denoting power efficiency for LED device (lm/W).

Power Law Consistency Index

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PowerLawConsistencyIndex
Type
Property
altLabel
K; consistency index

A property denoting power law consistency index and determined in Rheology Measurement.

Power Law Flow Index

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PowerLawFlowIndex
Type
Property
altLabel
flow index; flow behavior index n

A property denoting flow behavior index n from power-law fit of viscosity vs shear rate; n<1 indicates shear-thinning.

Power Loss Percent

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PowerLossPercent
Type
Property
altLabel
power loss after AST

A property denoting power loss percent.

Pressure Dependent Gas Diffusion Resistance

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PressureDependentGasDiffusionResistance
Type
Property
altLabel
R_PD; pressure dependent resistance; R_MD

A property denoting pressure-dependent component (molecular diffusion in large pores/diffusion media).

Pressure Independent Gas Diffusion Resistance

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PressureIndependentGasDiffusionResistance
Type
Property
altLabel
R_PI; pressure independent resistance; R_NF

A property denoting pressure-independent component of transport resistance (Knudsen + ionomer film).

Primary Agglomerate Pore Size

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PrimaryAgglomeratePoreSize
Type
Property
altLabel
pores within primary agglomerates; primary pore size

A property denoting primary agglomerate pore size and determined in Literature Microstructure Compilation and Nitrogen Physisorption Measurement.

Printability Z Number

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PrintabilityZNumber
Type
Property
altLabel
Z; Z number

A property denoting printability Z number and determined in Ink Printability Assessment.

Printable Working Time Max

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PrintableWorkingTimeMax
Type
Property
altLabel
working time window; working time max

A property denoting printable working time max.

Printable Working Time Min

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PrintableWorkingTimeMin
Type
Property
altLabel
working time window; working time min

A property denoting printable working time min.

Printed CNT Structure Height

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PrintedCNTStructureHeight
Type
Property
altLabel
CNT height; height of CNT dots/lines

A property denoting printed CNT structure height and determined in Stylus Profilometry Measurement.

Printed Trace Width

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PrintedTraceWidth
Type
Property
altLabel
width of the silver trace; trace width

A property denoting measured width of printed conductive silver trace in composite (µm).

Projector Light Intensity

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ProjectorLightIntensity
Type
Property
altLabel
light intensity

A property denoting irradiance/intensity of DLP projector measured by radiometer (mW/cm2).

Protonic Catalyst Layer Resistance

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ProtonicCatalystLayerResistance
Type
Property
altLabel
R_ion; protonic CL resistance; protonic layer resistance

A property denoting protonic resistance of cathode catalyst layer (fitted with transmission line model from EIS).

Protonic Catalyst Layer Resistivity

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ProtonicCatalystLayerResistivity
Type
Property
altLabel
protonic resistivity; ρ_H+; proton resistivity

A property denoting protonic catalyst layer resistivity and determined in Electrochemical Impedance Spectroscopy Potentiostatic and Proton Conductivity Measurement.

Pseudo Double Layer Capacitance

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PseudoDoubleLayerCapacitance
Type
Property
altLabel
Cpdl; Cpd1

A property denoting pseudo double layer capacitance and determined in Electrochemical Impedance Spectroscopy Potentiostatic.

Pseudo First Order Rate Constant

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PseudoFirstOrderRateConstant
Type
Property

A property denoting pseudo-first-order kinetic rate constant extracted from ln(C0/C) vs time for RhB degradation.

Pt Atomic Percent

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PtAtomicPercent
Type
Property
altLabel
Pt [atom%]; EDX; STEM-EDX

A property denoting atomic percent of Pt in Pt/Ru catalyst particles or networks (from EDX).

Pt Chemical Surface Area

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PtChemicalSurfaceArea
Type
Property
altLabel
CSA(TEM); chemical surface area; CSA

A property denoting pt chemical surface area and determined in Electron Microscopy Imaging.

Pt Crystallite Size

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PtCrystalliteSize
Type
Property
altLabel
Pt crystallite size (XRD); Scherrer; mean crystallite size

A property denoting pt crystallite size estimated from XRD (111) peak via Scherrer equation.

Pt Effectiveness

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PtEffectiveness
Type
Property
altLabel
effectiveness of Pt; Ef_Pt; effectiveness of Pt (Ef_Pt)

A property denoting concept/metric linking transport through ionomer film to effective utilization of Pt (review cites Lee et al. model).

Pt Loading

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PtLoading
Type
Property
altLabel
µg_Pt cm^-2; Pt catalyst loading; mg_Pt cm−2

A property denoting platinum mass per geometric area of CCM.

Pt Mass Per Power

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PtMassPerPower
Type
Property
altLabel
Pt utilization (g_Pt kW^-1); Pt per kW; gPt/kW

A property denoting platinum mass required per unit power output (g_Pt per kW), used as a system-level Pt-usage metric in the review.

Pt Mass Specific Current

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PtMassSpecificCurrent
Type
Property

A property denoting pt mass specific current and determined in MEAPolarization.

Pt Mass Specific Peak Power Density

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PtMassSpecificPeakPowerDensity
Type
Property
altLabel
Pt-mass specific power density; mass specific power density; mass power

A property denoting peak power density normalized to Pt mass loading (specific power).

Pt Mass Specific Power Density

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PtMassSpecificPowerDensity
Type
Property

A property denoting Pt-mass-normalized power output at a specified current density (here 600 mA/cm²). Separate from peak mass-specific power.

Pt Particle Diameter Increase Percent

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PtParticleDiameterIncreasePercent
Type
Property

A property denoting percent increase in mean Pt particle diameter during conditioning/break-in.

Pt Particle Size

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PtParticleSize
Type
Property
altLabel
Pt nanoparticle size; mean particle size; Pt particle diameter

A property denoting size of Pt nanoparticles in Pt/C catalyst (nm scale).

Pt Poisoning by Ionomer

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PtPoisoningByIonomer
Type
Property
altLabel
Pt poisoning; Pt anion poisoning; poisoning of Pt by sulfonic acid groups

A property denoting phenomenon/metric describing reduced ORR activity due to adsorption/poisoning of Pt by ionomer sulfonate groups (review discussion).

Pt To Ru Atomic Ratio

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PtToRuAtomicRatio
Type
Property
altLabel
Pt/Ru ratio; Pt/Ru; EDX

A property denoting atomic ratio Pt/Ru determined from EDX composition (dimensionless).

Pt Utilization

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PtUtilization
Type
Property
altLabel
U_Pt; ECSA utilization; catalyst utilization

A property denoting fraction of Pt that is electrochemically accessible (ratio of ECSA to theoretical surface area).

Pt Utilization Relative Increase

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PtUtilizationRelativeIncrease
Type
Property
altLabel
Pt utilization difference (structure 1 vs 2); relative utilization increase

A property denoting relative increase in mean current density per Pt surface (structure 1 reported 22% higher than structure 2).

Pulse Power Density

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PulsePowerDensity
Type
Property
altLabel
Ppulse; pulse power

A property denoting description=Average power density delivered during a galvanostatic discharge pulse (energy/time over pulse).

Pyridinic Nitrogen Fraction Percent

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PyridinicNitrogenFractionPercent
Type
Property
altLabel
pyridinic N

A property denoting percent of N 1s assigned to pyridinic nitrogen (XPS deconvolution).

Pyrrolic Nitrogen Fraction Percent

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PyrrolicNitrogenFractionPercent
Type
Property

A property denoting percent of N 1s assigned to pyrrolic nitrogen (XPS deconvolution).

QSDFT Surface Area Nitrogen

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#QSDFTSurfaceAreaNitrogen
Type
Property
altLabel
QSDFT surface area; DFT surface area; QSDFT area

A property denoting qSDFT-derived (quenched solid density functional theory) surface area from N2 physisorption.

Quantum Dot Loading Weight Percent

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#QuantumDotLoadingWeightPercent
Type
Property

A property denoting quantum dot loading weight percent.

Radius Of Gyration

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#RadiusOfGyration
Type
Property
altLabel
Rg

A property denoting radius of gyration (Rg) of ink aggregates/agglomerates extracted from Guinier fits to USAXS data.

Raman D Band Peak Wavenumber

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#RamanDBandPeakWavenumber
Type
Property
altLabel
Raman D band; D-band peak; D band peak position

A property denoting raman D-band peak position (wavenumber) for carbon disorder band.

Raman D Band Wavenumber

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#RamanDBandWavenumber
Type
Property
altLabel
Raman D-band peak position

A property denoting Raman wavenumber (cm^-1) of the carbon D-band peak in dried ink films.

Raman G Band Peak Wavenumber

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#RamanGBandPeakWavenumber
Type
Property
altLabel
Raman G band; G-band peak; G band peak position

A property denoting raman G-band peak position (wavenumber) used to assess carbon structural changes.

Raman G Band Wavenumber

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#RamanGBandWavenumber
Type
Property
altLabel
Raman G-band peak position; Raman shift for carbon G-band

A property denoting Raman wavenumber (cm^-1) of the carbon G-band peak in dried ink films.

Raman I 2 D To IG Ratio

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#RamanI2DToIGRatio
Type
Property
altLabel
I2D/IG

A property denoting intensity ratio of Raman 2D band to G band used to indicate graphene stacking/restacking.

Raman ID To IG Ratio

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#RamanIDToIGRatio
Type
Property
altLabel
ID/IG; D/G band intensity ratio; R = ID/IG

A property denoting Raman D-band to G-band intensity ratio (ID/IG) for carbon structure.

Raman IG To ID Ratio

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#RamanIGToIDRatio
Type
Property
altLabel
I_G/I_D ratio; I_G/I_D

A property denoting raman IG to ID ratio and determined in Raman Spectroscopy Measurement.

Reduction Completion Temperature

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ReductionCompletionTemperature
Type
Property
altLabel
complete reduction temperature

A property denoting temperature at which a specific oxide is no longer detected / reduction completes.

Reduction Onset Temperature

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ReductionOnsetTemperature
Type
Property
altLabel
onset temperature; reduction start temperature

A property denoting temperature at which reduction of a specific oxide (or binder removal step) initiates under given atmosphere and heating rate.

Reduction Peak Current

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ReductionPeakCurrent
Type
Property
altLabel
reduction current; ORR reduction current; peak cathodic current

A property denoting cathodic peak current associated with oxygen reduction in CV (O2-saturated electrolyte).

Reduction Peak Potential

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ReductionPeakPotential
Type
Property
altLabel
ORR peak potential; ORR reduction peak potential; CICo

A property denoting electrode potential at ORR reduction peak in CV (reported vs Ag/AgCl).

Reduction Potential

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ReductionPotential
Type
Property
altLabel
formal potential; E°; AQS reduction potential

A property denoting average redox reduction potential estimated from CV peak positions; reported vs SHE for AQS and BQDS.

Refractive Index

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#RefractiveIndex
Type
Property

A property denoting refractive index of dispersion medium (used in DLS/optical parameters and Hamaker constant calculation).

Reinfiltration Mass Increase

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ReinfiltrationMassIncrease
Type
Property
altLabel
mass increase after reinfiltration

A property denoting percent mass increase after one polymer reinfiltration cycle (PIP trial).

Relative Current Density Change

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#RelativeCurrentDensityChange
Type
Property
altLabel
current density decreases; current density yield; current density decrease

A property denoting relative current density change.

Relative Density

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#RelativeDensity
Type
Property
altLabel
near-full density

A property denoting density expressed relative to theoretical full density; often inferred from porosity.

Relative Increase In Peak Power Density

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#RelativeIncreaseInPeakPowerDensity
Type
Property

A property denoting relative change in peak power density between MIP-modified and control anodes.

Relative Oxygen Permeability

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#RelativeOxygenPermeability
Type
Property
altLabel
thin-film permeability ratio; O2 permeability ratio vs bulk

A property denoting dimensionless ratio of oxygen permeability of thin PFSA ionomer film (at interface) relative to bulk PFSA membrane.

Relative Performance Variation Percent

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#RelativePerformanceVariationPercent
Type
Property
altLabel
performance variation; relative performance variation

A property denoting relative performance variation percent and determined in Fuel Cell Polarization Measurement.

Relative Proton Conductivity

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#RelativeProtonConductivity
Type
Property
altLabel
σ_H+^R

A property denoting dimensionless relative proton conductivity defined as σ_eff / σ_bulk for the ionomer phase/network in the catalyst layer.

Relative Variation Percent

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#RelativeVariationPercent
Type
Property
altLabel
Variation (%); maximum percentage variation

A property denoting ratio (Mmax−Mmin)/Mavg ×100% for repeated dispensing mass.

Relative Volatilization Rate

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#RelativeVolatilizationRate
Type
Property
altLabel
volatilization rate (relative)

A property denoting relative volatilization rate and determined in Solvent Property Measurement.

Residual Chloride Content

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ResidualChlorideContent
Type
Property
altLabel
residual Cl- content; Cl- content

A property denoting residual chloride content remaining after etching, estimated from XPS.

Residual Iron Content

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ResidualIronContent
Type
Property
altLabel
residual Fe3+ content; Fe3+ content

A property denoting residual Fe content remaining after etching, estimated from XPS.

Residual Rate

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ResidualRate
Type
Property
altLabel
residual analysis

A property denoting residual fraction/rate metric for ink stability (e.g., residual rate after storage/dispersion); not present as named Property in ontology.

Rheology Measurement 2

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#RheologyMeasurement2
Type
Property
altLabel
Viscosity

A property denoting rheology measurement 2 and determined in Rheology Measurement.

Ri Over Cd Sqrt

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#RiOverCdSqrt
Type
Property
altLabel
(Ri/Cd)^(1/2) slope; (Ri/Cd)^−1/2

A property denoting slope-derived parameter from |Z| vs ω^(-1/2) used to calculate Ri when Cd is known; unit label in paper appears inconsistent, verify.

Ricinoleic Acid Mass Fraction

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#RicinoleicAcidMassFraction
Type
Property
altLabel
Ricinoleic fatty acid%

A property denoting ricinoleic acid mass fraction and determined in Gas Chromatography Measurement.

Root Mean Square Error

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#RootMeanSquareError
Type
Property
altLabel
RMSE

A property denoting prediction performance metric: root mean square error between measured and predicted voltage.

Roughness Factor

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#RoughnessFactor
Type
Property
altLabel
rf; inverse roughness factor; Apt

A property denoting roughness factor and determined in Cyclic Voltammetry and Optical Microscopy Imaging Measurement.

Ru Atomic Percent

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#RuAtomicPercent
Type
Property
altLabel
Ru [atom%]; EDX; STEM-EDX

A property denoting atomic percent of Ru in Pt/Ru catalyst particles or networks (from EDX).

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SaturatedResidualWaterAmount
Type
Property
altLabel
saturated water amount; saturated water amount in GDL; water amount in membrane

A property denoting estimated residual liquid water per area used for subzero storage (dominant contribution from GDL).

Semi Empirical Parameter A

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SemiEmpiricalParameterA
Type
Property
altLabel
parameter a

A property denoting semi-empirical polarization model parameter a (voltage intercept term).

Shear Stress

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ShearStress
Type
Property
altLabel
mmHg

A property denoting shear stress applied/measured in rheological tests (flow curve).

Sheet Resistance

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SheetResistance
Type
Property
altLabel
Ω/sq; electrical resistance (sheet); sq^-1

A property denoting sheet resistance and determined in Four Probe Resistance Measurement, Reported Material Property, and Material Specification.

Short Circuit Current Density

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ShortCircuitCurrentDensity
Type
Property
altLabel
Jsc

A property denoting short-circuit current density of a solar cell under illumination.

Si OH Group Weight Percent

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SiOHGroupWeightPercent
Type
Property
altLabel
Si–OH groups (wt%); Si-OH wt%; Si–OH groups

A property denoting weight percent of Si–OH groups on silica nanosheets from XPS deconvolution.

Silicon Dioxide Weight Percent In Catalyst

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SiliconDioxideWeightPercentInCatalyst
Type
Property
altLabel
SiO2

A property denoting silicon dioxide weight percent in catalyst.

SO 3 Stretch Wavenumber

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SO3StretchWavenumber
Type
Property

A property denoting FTIR wavenumber (cm^-1) of Nafion sulfonate (-SO3-) asymmetric stretching peak.

Solar Energy Fraction Infrared

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SolarEnergyFractionInfrared
Type
Property
altLabel
infrared wavelength region

A property denoting fraction of AM1.5G solar energy in infrared region as stated in review.

Solar Energy Fraction UV

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SolarEnergyFractionUV
Type
Property
altLabel
UV wavelength region

A property denoting fraction of AM1.5G solar energy in UV region as stated in review.

Solar Energy Fraction Visible

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SolarEnergyFractionVisible
Type
Property
altLabel
visible wavelength region

A property denoting fraction of AM1.5G solar energy in visible region as stated in review.

Solubility Parameter Total

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SolubilityParameterTotal
Type
Property
altLabel
solubility parameter; delta_s; Hansen solubility parameter (δ)

A property denoting total (Hildebrand/Hansen total) solubility parameter in MPa^0.5; used for ionomer-solvent affinity.

Solution Conductivity

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SolutionConductivity
Type
Property
altLabel
SC; electrolyte conductivity

A property denoting electrical conductivity of the MFC electrolyte/buffer solution.

Specific Activity

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SpecificActivity
Type
Property

A property denoting specific activity.

Specific Area Activity At 0 p 9 V

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SpecificAreaActivityAt0p9V
Type
Property
altLabel
specific area activity; SA; specific activity

A property denoting specific (ECSA-normalized) catalytic activity estimated at 0.9 V_iR-free (A per cm2_Pt).

Stability Ratio

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#StabilityRatio
Type
Property
altLabel
W

A property denoting colloidal stability ratio (inverse of collision efficiency) from DLVO-type model.

Stearic Acid Mass Fraction

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#StearicAcidMassFraction
Type
Property
altLabel
Stearic fatty acid%

A property denoting stearic acid mass fraction and determined in Gas Chromatography Measurement.

Storage Modulus

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#StorageModulus
Type
Property
altLabel
G'; elastic modulus; shear storage modulus

A property denoting storage modulus (G′) characterizing ink elasticity under oscillatory shear.

Storage Modulus Increase Onset Time

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#StorageModulusIncreaseOnsetTime
Type
Property
altLabel
significant increase of the storage modulus started occurring after; time sweep onset

A property denoting time at which storage modulus begins to increase significantly in time sweep (indicating geopolymerization progress).

Strain Gauge Factor

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#StrainGaugeFactor
Type
Property
altLabel
SFG; gauge factor

A property denoting sensitivity metric for strain sensor, defined from relative impedance change vs strain amplitude.

Sulfonate Coverage

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SulfonateCoverage
Type
Property
altLabel
Θ (SO3- coverage on Pt)

A property denoting dimensionless coverage inferred by normalizing CO displacement charge at 0.4 Vcell to ECA.

Sulfur Atomic Percent

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SulfurAtomicPercent
Type
Property
altLabel
S atomic percent

A property denoting atomic percent of sulfur from XPS quantitative composition (no close match in ontology).

Sulfur Weight Percent In Catalyst Layer

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SulfurWeightPercentInCatalystLayer
Type
Property

A property denoting eDS-reported normalized sulfur concentration in catalyst layer (wt.%); S attributed to PFSA/Nafion.

Sulfuric Acid Mass Fraction

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SulfuricAcidMassFraction
Type
Property
altLabel
mass fraction sulfuric acid; % mass sulfuric acid; mass fraction H2SO4

A property denoting sulfuric acid mass fraction.

Surface Basicity Change Delta P Hf

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SurfaceBasicityChangeDeltaPHf
Type
Property
altLabel
ΔpHf; surface basicity change

A property denoting ΔpHf = pHf(wetted) − pHf(pristine); negative implies more acidic surface after treatment.

Surface Concentration

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SurfaceConcentration
Type
Property
altLabel
mol/cm2

A property denoting surface concentration and determined in Cyclic Voltammetry.

Surface Film Resistance

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SurfaceFilmResistance
Type
Property
altLabel
R_f; film resistance; surface oxide film resistance

A property denoting High-frequency resistance component assigned to surface oxide film (from equivalent circuit fits), normalized by geometric area.

Surface Hydrophilicity Ratio

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SurfaceHydrophilicityRatio
Type
Property
altLabel
hydrophilicity ratio; surface hydrophobicity/hydrophilicity

A property denoting metric defined as ratio of BET areas from water vapor and nitrogen adsorption.

Surface Roughness Ra

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SurfaceRoughnessRa
Type
Property
altLabel
Average Ra; Ra; HL

A property denoting arithmetic average surface roughness (Ra) of MPL measured by stylus profilometry.

Surface Roughness Rq

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SurfaceRoughnessRq
Type
Property
altLabel
Rq

A property denoting surface roughness quantified as RMS height (Rq) of the coating profile.

Surface Roughness Sa

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SurfaceRoughnessSa
Type
Property
altLabel
Sa

A property denoting areal arithmetic mean height (Sa) roughness metric measured on microfilament surfaces.

Surface Tension

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SurfaceTension
Type
Property
altLabel
ink surface tension; carbon cloth surface tension; surface tension (d cm−1)

A property denoting surface tension of solvent; affects wetting, coating, and film formation.

Surface To Volume Ratio

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SurfaceToVolumeRatio
Type
Property
altLabel
Surface/Volume [nm²/nm³]; SIRT/DART

A property denoting surface area divided by volume for catalyst network morphology (from tomography).

Swelling Fraction

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SwellingFraction
Type
Property
altLabel
fractional swelling; nearly 0.8 swelling fraction; swelling ratio

A property denoting fractional swelling (dimensionless) of thin films as a function of RH and dopant concentration.

Tack Value

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#TackValue
Type
Property
altLabel
tack value (U.T.)

A property denoting tack value and determined in Rheology Measurement.

Tafel Slope

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#TafelSlope
Type
Property
altLabel
TS; Tafel slope b; Tafel slope (mV/dec)

A property denoting tafel slope and determined in MEAPolarization, Linear Sweep Voltammetry, and Tafel Slope Step Analysis.

Tensile Strength

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#TensileStrength
Type
Property
altLabel
tensile stress at break

A property denoting ultimate tensile strength of membrane (undoped/doped).

Tetrahydrofurfural Selectivity

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#TetrahydrofurfuralSelectivity
Type
Property
altLabel
selectivity to THFAL

A property denoting selectivity to tetrahydrofurfural (percent).

Tetrahydrofurfuryl Alcohol Selectivity

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#TetrahydrofurfurylAlcoholSelectivity
Type
Property
altLabel
selectivity to THFOL

A property denoting selectivity to tetrahydrofurfuryl alcohol (percent).

Theoretical Metal Surface Area

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#TheoreticalMetalSurfaceArea
Type
Property
altLabel
SA; maximum theoretical metal surface area; SA(Pt)

A property denoting theoretical metal surface area calculated from crystallite size and density assumptions (m²/g).

Thermal Event Peak Temperature

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ThermalEventPeakTemperature
Type
Property
altLabel
endothermic peak temperature; exothermic peak temperature; DSC peak temperature

A property denoting dSC peak temperatures indicating melting, decomposition, or curing events (e.g., 60°C, 222°C, 245°C, 309°C, 316°C).

Thickness Difference Percent

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ThicknessDifferencePercent
Type
Property
altLabel
Dmicro3D; thickness difference (%)

A property denoting percent difference between thickness estimates from different methods/simulations.

Thixotropy Hysteresis Area

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ThixotropyHysteresisArea
Type
Property
altLabel
thixotropy (area between up/down curves)

A property denoting thixotropy hysteresis area and determined in Three Interval Thixotropy Test.

Thixotropy Recovery Fraction

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ThixotropyRecoveryFraction
Type
Property
altLabel
% recovery; thixotropic recovery; recovery fraction

A property denoting fraction of original storage modulus recovered after a high-strain breakdown step (thixotropic recovery metric).

Through Plane Electronic Conductivity

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ThroughPlaneElectronicConductivity
Type
Property
altLabel
σ_cl; tp; electrical conductivity

A property denoting through plane electronic conductivity and determined in Through Plane Electronic Conductivity Measurement.

Total Gas Diffusion Resistance

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#TotalGasDiffusionResistance
Type
Property
altLabel
R_total; GDL oxygen transport resistance; gas diffusion resistance

A property denoting total oxygen/gas diffusion resistance derived from limiting current density vs pressure.

Total Internal Resistance

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#TotalInternalResistance
Type
Property
altLabel
Rint; internal resistance; MFC-CICo

A property denoting overall internal resistance from semi-empirical polarization fit (includes bulk+interfacial).

Total Pore Volume

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#TotalPoreVolume
Type
Property
altLabel
V_tot; pore volume; Pore volume (cc/g_catalyst)

A property denoting total pore volume from N2 adsorption (Gurvich rule at p/ps=0.99). Unit in paper appears as cm^3 g^-1 (verify).

Total Porosity

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#TotalPorosity
Type
Property
altLabel
% porosity

A property denoting total porosity (open+closed) of printed lattice body.

Total Pt Loading

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#TotalPtLoading
Type
Property
altLabel
total Pt loading (anode+cathode)

A property denoting total pt loading.

Transparency

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#Transparency
Type
Property
altLabel
Transparency% (B*); Transparency% (A*)

A property denoting transparency and determined in Xrite Optical Property Measurement.

Triiodide Diffusion Coefficient

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#TriiodideDiffusionCoefficient
Type
Property
altLabel
D; diffusion coefficient of triiodide

A property denoting estimated diffusion coefficient of I3- in the electrolyte from limiting current density in Tafel analysis.

True Density

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#TrueDensity
Type
Property
altLabel
skeleton density; ρ_t; skeletal density

A property denoting true/skeleton density measured by helium pycnometry on finely milled samples.

Turnover Frequency

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#TurnoverFrequency
Type
Property
altLabel
TOF

A property denoting turnover frequency.

Vapor Pressure

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#VaporPressure
Type
Property
altLabel
P; vapour pressure

A property denoting vapor pressure and determined in Solvent Physical Property Compilation and Solvent Property Measurement.

Viscosity

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#Viscosity
Type
Property
altLabel
ink viscosity; apparent viscosity; dynamic viscosity

A property denoting dynamic viscosity of solvents, ionomer dispersions, or catalyst inks (often shear-rate dependent).

Viscosity Recovery Time

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ViscosityRecoveryTime
Type
Property
altLabel
viscosity recovery; recovery time

A property denoting characteristic time for ink to recover high viscosity after cessation of high shear (post-extrusion).

Warburg Coefficient

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#WarburgCoefficient
Type
Property
altLabel
W; Warburg

A property denoting warburg coefficient and determined in Electrochemical Impedance Spectroscopy Potentiostatic and Electrochemical Impedance Spectroscopy Galvanostatic.

Warburg Impedance

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#WarburgImpedance
Type
Property
altLabel
Zw

A property denoting warburg impedance and determined in Electrochemical Impedance Spectroscopy Potentiostatic.

Water Activated Electrochemically Active Surface Area

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#WaterActivatedElectrochemicallyActiveSurfaceArea
Type
Property
altLabel
ECSA_water; water activated ECSA; liquid water activated ECSA

A property denoting water activated electrochemically active surface area and determined in Carbon Monoxide Stripping Voltammetry.

Water Diffusion Coefficient

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#WaterDiffusionCoefficient
Type
Property

A property denoting dynamic diffusion coefficient for water uptake in PFSA membranes (Fickian diffusion coefficient).

Water Uptake Indicator

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#WaterUptakeIndicator
Type
Property
altLabel
water uptake; λ_HNN9; λ_HNN4

A property denoting water uptake indicator and determined in Water Vapor Adsorption Measurement, Literature Review Synthesis, and Molecular Dynamics Simulation.

Water Uptake Ratio

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#WaterUptakeRatio
Type
Property
altLabel
water uptake; water uptake (wt%)

A property denoting ratio of maximum adsorption volumes from water vapor vs N2 adsorption.

Weight Average Molecular Weight

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#WeightAverageMolecularWeight
Type
Property
altLabel
Mw

A property denoting weight average molecular weight and determined in Gel Permeation Chromatography Measurement.

Weight Increase After Impregnation

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#WeightIncreaseAfterImpregnation
Type
Property
altLabel
weight increased by; weight increase

A property denoting percent weight increase after colloidal silica immersion/impregnation.

XRD Peak FWHM

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#XRDPeakFWHM
Type
Property
altLabel
FWHM

A property denoting xRD peak full width at half maximum (degrees).

XRD Peak Position 2 Theta

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#XRDPeakPosition2Theta
Type
Property
altLabel
peak position (2θ)

A property denoting xRD peak position expressed in 2θ angle (degrees).

Yield Stress

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#YieldStress
Type
Property
altLabel
gel strength; tau_y; shear yield stress

A property denoting stress at which ink transitions from solid-like to liquid-like behavior (taken at G'/G" crossover).

Youngs Modulus

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#YoungsModulus
Type
Property
altLabel
elastic modulus

A property denoting young’s modulus of membrane (undoped/doped).

Zero Shear Viscosity

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ZeroShearViscosity
Type
Property

A property denoting zero shear viscosity and determined in Rheology Measurement.

Zeta Potential

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ZetaPotential
Type
Property
altLabel
ζ-potential; surface zeta potential; electrokinetic potential

A property denoting zeta potential of colloidal particles in ink; indicator of dispersion stability.

Manufacturing / Processes

133 terms

Accelerated Stress Test Voltage Cycling

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#AcceleratedStressTestVoltageCycling
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
AST; voltage cycling; accelerated stress testing

Accelerated stress test: voltage cycling between 0.6–0.95 V for 30,000 cycles at controlled RH_AST.

Acid Doping

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#AcidDoping
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
phosphoric acid doping

Process of doping cross-linked PAA/PVA films by immersion in sulfuric acid solution to tune ionic strength.

Acid Etching Process

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#AcidEtchingProcess
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
acid etching

Acid washing/etching step to remove Fe species (6 M HCl, repeated).

Acid Leaching Process

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#AcidLeachingProcess
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
acid–leaching method; acid leaching; oxalic acid leaching

Process to generate silica nanosheets from vermiculite by acid treatment.

Acid Treatment Of CCM

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#AcidTreatmentOfCCM
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
acid-treated CCM

A manufacturing process for acid treatment of CCM using Catalyst Coated Membrane.

Air Breathing Cathode Fabrication

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#AirBreathingCathodeFabrication
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
cathode fabrication; air-breathing cathode

Fabrication of air-breathing cathode pellets from AC/CB/PTFE mixture plus catalyst, pressed onto stainless-steel mesh current collector.

Ambient Pressure Chemical Vapor Deposition Synthesis

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#AmbientPressureChemicalVaporDepositionSynthesis
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
AP-CVD; ambient pressure CVD; ambient pressure-chemical vapor deposition

A manufacturing process for ambient pressure chemical vapor deposition synthesis using Silver Foil, Selenium Powder, and Catalyst Layer with Tube Furnace and producing Beta Ag 2 Se, Carbon Nanotube Forest, and Amorphous Carbon Deposit.

Amine Hydrolysis Process

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#AmineHydrolysisProcess
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
amine hydrolysis

Amine hydrolysis step (with triethylamine) used to form MS@NiFeO nanohybrids.

Atomic Layer Deposition

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#AtomicLayerDeposition
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
ALD

Pt deposition process used to synthesize Pt/NbB2 catalyst (MeCpMe3Pt precursor).

Ball Milling

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#BallMilling
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
roller mill; planetary milling; Fritsch planetary mill

Dispersion method for catalyst ink; not present as a named process in ontology.

Boiling Pretreatment

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#BoilingPretreatment
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
H2O2 boiling; boil pretreatment; water boiling

Boiling membrane/CCM in water (or peroxide solutions) as pre-hydration/cleaning step.

Break In Procedure

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#BreakInProcedure
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
break-in; activation procedure; conditioning procedure

MEA break-in/conditioning procedure prior to characterization (current hold + voltage steps).

Brush Coating

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#BrushCoating
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
brushing; brushed into the MPL; brushed onto membrane

Manual/low-shear coating method for depositing catalyst inks.

Carbon Pretreatment Process

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CarbonPretreatmentProcess
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
carbon pretreatment

Modified CCVD step where only carbon source (ethylene) is fed initially to form a carbon layer before introducing N-source.

Carbothermal Graphitization Annealing

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CarbothermalGraphitizationAnnealing
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
annealed; catalytic carbothermal graphitization

High-temperature annealing under N2 (e.g., 1000°C) to promote Fe-catalyzed graphitization to graphene flakes.

Catalyst Impregnation

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CatalystImpregnation
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
wetness impregnation; incipient wetness impregnation

A manufacturing process for catalyst impregnation using Support Material and Precursor Solution with Oven and producing Impregnated Support.

Catalyst Ink Preparation

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CatalystInkPreparation
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
ink preparation; catalyst ink; suspension preparation

A manufacturing process for catalyst ink preparation using Catalyst Powder, Solvent, and Ionomer Solution with Magnetic Stirrer, Ultrasonicator, and Planetary Mixer and producing Catalyst Ink, PDL Ag NW Composite Ink, and Solvent Mixture.

Catalyst Wetting Drying Treatment

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CatalystWettingDryingTreatment
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
wetting treatment; wetting/drying treatment; wetting and subsequent drying

A manufacturing process for catalyst wetting drying treatment using Fe NC Catalyst and Water.

Catalyzed Diffusion Medium Method

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CatalyzedDiffusionMediumMethod
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
catalyzed diffusion medium (CDM) method

A manufacturing process for catalyzed diffusion medium method.

Cathode Starvation Activation

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CathodeStarvationActivation
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
cathode starvation

Break-in method using cathode oxygen starvation leading to H2 evolution/reducing conditions.

Centrifugation Process

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CentrifugationProcess
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
centrifuging; centrifugal concentration; centrifuged

Separation step to isolate modified catalyst solids after polymerization.

Co Reduction Process

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CoReductionProcess
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
co-reduction

Hydrogen reduction of blended oxides (Fe2O3+NiO+MoO3) to metals, enabling subsequent alloy formation.

CO Stripping Activation

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#COStrippingActivation
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
CO-stripping

Activation method using CO adsorption/oxidation stripping to clean Pt surface.

Cold Isostatic Pressing Process

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ColdIsostaticPressingProcess
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
cold isostatic press; CIP

A manufacturing process for cold isostatic pressing process.

Colloidal Method Ink Preparation

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ColloidalMethodInkPreparation
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
colloidal method; ink preparation; slurry preparation

Ink method where PBI forms colloid/precipitate when dripped into acetone and ultrasonicated; compared against solution method.

Colloidal Silica Impregnation

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ColloidalSilicaImpregnation
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
immersion in colloidal silica; impregnation treatment

Vacuum-assisted immersion/impregnation of parts with colloidal silica binder (followed by second sintering).

Colloidal Synthesis Process

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ColloidalSynthesisProcess
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
colloidal synthesis

Colloidal synthesis of Cu2WS4 nanocubes using metal chlorides + sulfur in oleylamine; heated 180°C then 300°C.

Continuous Mode Printing

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ContinuousModePrinting
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
continuous mode

Conventional DIW printing mode where geometry is sliced into layers and filled with continuous filaments.

Convection Drying

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ConvectionDrying
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
convection dryer; dried in convection dryer; annealed in convection oven

Drying step in convection dryer after printing.

Coprecipitation Synthesis

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CoprecipitationSynthesis
Type
Manufacturing

Synthesis of LDH precursors by coprecipitation from metal nitrate solutions into Na2CO3 at controlled pH.

Debinding Process

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#DebindingProcess
Type
Manufacturing

Thermal removal/decomposition of polymer binder and organics prior to sintering.

Decal Transfer

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#DecalTransfer
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
decal transfer method; transfer via hot-pressing; transfer through hot press

Transfer of dried catalyst layer (decal) from PTFE substrate onto membrane during MEA fabrication.

Dialysis Purification Process

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#DialysisPurificationProcess
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
dialysis purification

Purification step to remove unreacted monomers by dialysis against DI water.

Dip Coating Process

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#DipCoatingProcess
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
dip coating; dip-coated

Dip-coating of carbon cloth in Ni-Co thiolate ink prior to thermolysis

Direct Ink Writing

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#DirectInkWriting
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
DIW; direct-write additive manufacturing; direct ink writing (DIW)

Additive manufacturing process where a viscoelastic ink is extruded through a nozzle along a programmed toolpath.

Direct Membrane Deposition

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#DirectMembraneDeposition
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
DMD

MEA fabrication technique where ionomer dispersion is deposited directly on a gas diffusion electrode to form PEM/CL interface (as described by Klingele et al.).

DLP Printing

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#DLPPrinting
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
vat photopolymerization-based DLP printing

Top-down digital light processing (DLP) vat photopolymerization used to print photopolymer matrix layers (not found in ontology).

Doctor Blade Coating

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#DoctorBladeCoating
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
doctor blade; bar-coating; knife coating

Coating method using a blade to control wet film thickness during CL deposition.

Drop Casting Process

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#DropCastingProcess
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
drop cast; drop casting; drop-cast method

Process of depositing catalyst ink onto carbon paper GDL.

Dye Sensitization Process

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#DyeSensitizationProcess
Type
Manufacturing

Soaking TiO2 photoanode in N719 dye solution (5.10e-3 M) for 18 h.

Electrode Sintering

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ElectrodeSintering
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
dried and sintered; thermal sintering between layers

Thermal treatment of sprayed electrodes (190°C for 1 h in inert ventilated oven).

Electroless Copper Plating Process

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ElectrolessCopperPlatingProcess
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
electroless Cu plating

Autocatalytic electroless deposition of copper on Pd-activated PET substrates from alkaline formaldehyde bath.

Electron Beam Evaporation Deposition

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ElectronBeamEvaporationDeposition
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
electron beam evaporation; e-beam evaporation

Deposition process used to coat Si wafer with aluminum thin film.

Electrospinning Deposition

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ElectrospinningDeposition
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
electrospun

A manufacturing process for electrospinning deposition using Catalyst Ink and Proton Exchange Membrane and producing Cathode Catalyst Layer, Electrospun Catalyst Layer, and Ionomer Nanofiber Scaffolding Catalyst Layer.

Electrospray Deposition

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ElectrosprayDeposition
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
electrosprayed; electro-spraying; electrostatic spray

A manufacturing process for electrospray deposition using Catalyst Ink and Proton Exchange Membrane with Syringe Pump, High Voltage Power Supply, and XY Moving Stage and producing Cathode Catalyst Layer, Electrosprayed Catalyst Layer, and Ionomer Nanofiber Scaffolding Catalyst Layer.

Filament On Demand Mode

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#FilamentOnDemandMode
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
filament-on-demand

DIW deposition mode where extrusion is started/stopped per-pillar (analogous to inkjet drop-on-demand), enabling vertical free-standing pillars.

Free Radical Polymerization Process

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#FreeRadicalPolymerizationProcess
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
free radical polymerization

One-step grafting-from polymerization used to anchor ionomer/MIP on catalyst support.

Freeze Drying

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#FreezeDrying
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
FD; sublimation drying; freeze-dried

A manufacturing process for freeze drying using Printed Green Part with Freeze Drier and producing Printed Composite Structure.

Freeze Thaw Cycling Durability Test

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#FreezeThawCyclingDurabilityTest
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
freeze–thaw cycles

Protocol involving repeated freezing at subzero temperature with residual water and subsequent thaw/evaluation.

Galvanostatic Activation

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#GalvanostaticActivation
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
constant current activation

Break-in method at constant current density (galvanostatic hold).

Gas Diffusion Electrode Method

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#GasDiffusionElectrodeMethod
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
GDE method

MEA fabrication route where catalyst layer is prepared on GDL (forming GDE) then hot-pressed with PEM.

Gravure Coating

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#GravureCoating
Type
Manufacturing

Roll-to-roll printing/coating method for catalyst inks; discussed in context of scalable manufacturing.

High Pressure Homogenization

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#HighPressureHomogenization
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
high pressure homogenizer; homogenizer

High-pressure homogenizer dispersion method; not present as a named process in ontology.

High Shear Mixing

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#HighShearMixing
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
mechanical mixing; high shear mixer

High-shear mechanical dispersion method; not present as a named process in ontology.

Hot Pressing

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#HotPressing
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
hot-pressed; hot press; pressed

Manufacturing step transferring printed catalyst layer onto membrane using hot press.

Hybrid DLPDIW Printing

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#HybridDLPDIWPrinting
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
hybrid 3D printing system; hybrid multi-material 3D printing

Integrated process combining DLP printing with DIW printing in a single platform/job.

Hydrogen Pumping Activation

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#HydrogenPumpingActivation
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
hydrogen pumping

Activation method with H2 pumping (H2 at anode, inert at cathode, external power) to induce H2 evolution at cathode.

Hydrogen Reduction

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#HydrogenReduction
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
catalyst reduction; reduced in situ by hydrogen; hydrogen co-reduction

In-situ H2 reduction step prior to DRM testing (e.g., 850 °C, 10% H2/Ar).

Hydrothermal Synthesis Process

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#HydrothermalSynthesisProcess
Type
Manufacturing

Hydrothermal synthesis used to prepare MoS2 nanosheets and as part of hybrid synthesis.

Ink Degassing

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#InkDegassing
Type
Manufacturing

Degassing/deaeration step during catalyst ink preparation (4 min in MAZERUSTAR KK-250S).

Ink Extrusion Process

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#InkExtrusionProcess
Type
Manufacturing

Extrusion-based additive manufacturing step producing microfilaments from powder inks.

Ink Preparation Burning Reaction

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#InkPreparationBurningReaction
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
burning reaction; purposely burning reaction

Occurs when Nafion solution or isopropyl alcohol contacts dry Pt/C during ink preparation; reported to cause exothermic 'burning reaction' leading to Pt nanoparticle agglomeration and reduced BET surface area/ECSA.

Ink Ultrasonication

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#InkUltrasonication
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
ultrasonic bath; ultrasonic mixing; ultrasonicated

A manufacturing process for ink ultrasonication using Catalyst Ink, Pt Ru On Carbon Catalyst, and Isopropanol with Ultrasonicator and Ultrasonic Bath and producing Catalyst Ink.

Inkjet Printing

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#InkjetPrinting
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
ink-jet; digital printing

Digital printing method requiring controlled ink rheology and particle size to avoid nozzle clogging.

Inkjet Printing Process

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#InkjetPrintingProcess
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
inkjet printing; DOD inkjet printer

Drop-on-demand inkjet printing process used to print QD dot arrays.

KOH Immersion Activation

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#KOHImmersionActivation
Type
Manufacturing

Pre-conditioning/activation step: immersing GDE in 1 M KOH to exchange ionomer counterions (I− → OH−) prior to ORR tests.

KOH Soaking Pretreatment

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#KOHSoakingPretreatment
Type
Manufacturing

Pretreatment step for electrodes and AEM to exchange halide to OH− via soaking in 1 M KOH for 1 h, followed by washing.

Layer-by-Layer Deposition

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#LayerByLayerDeposition
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
layer-by-layer; LBL deposition

A manufacturing process for layer by layer deposition using Catalyst Ink and Proton Exchange Membrane and producing Catalyst Coated Membrane.

Ligand Exchange Process

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#LigandExchangeProcess
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
ligand exchange; MSA ligand exchange reaction; surface ligand exchange

Process of exchanging native ligands on QDs with MSA; includes stirring and purification.

Liquid Ethane Plunge Freezing

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#LiquidEthanePlungeFreezing
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
immersion freezing into liquid ethane; rapid freezing by liquid ethane; plunge freezing

Specimen preparation step: plunge/immersion freezing of TEM grids into liquid ethane to vitrify the ink/dispersion and avoid ice-crystal artifacts.

Liquid Nitrogen Freezing Treatment

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#LiquidNitrogenFreezingTreatment
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
liquid nitrogen freezing method; LN_1–LN_4 treatment

Cryogenic release step: liquid nitrogen scattered over MEA just before peeling decal substrate to improve transfer yield.

Liquid Phase Exfoliation Process

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#LiquidPhaseExfoliationProcess
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
liquid–phase exfoliation

Exfoliation of SN into few-layer nanosheets using ultrasonication in ethanol.

Liquid State Ligand Exchange

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#LiquidStateLigandExchange
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
solution-phase ligand exchange

Ligand exchange performed in solution phase to create CQD inks (phase transfer approach).

MEA Assembly Process

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#MEAAssemblyProcess
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
MEA assembly

A manufacturing process that assembles membrane electrode assembly components into an MEA using a protonated membrane, anode gas diffusion electrode, cathode gas diffusion electrode, torque wrench, and hot press.

Membrane Casting Process

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#MembraneCastingProcess
Type
Manufacturing

Casting/drying of polymer/filler solution to form membranes.

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#MembraneImmobilizationOnPyrexGlass
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
immobilized on pyrex glass; bonded on flat pyrex glass

A manufacturing process for membrane immobilization on pyrex glass using Proton Exchange Membrane and Pyrex Glass.

Meyer Rod Coating

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#MeyerRodCoating
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
Meyer rods; contact coating; bar coating

Wire-wound rod coating process used to deposit MPL ink onto carbon fiber paper substrate.

Oxygen Plasma Treatment

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#OxygenPlasmaTreatment
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
oxygen plasma

Surface treatment of substrates (e.g., thermanox) with oxygen plasma to improve ink adhesion/wetting prior to coating/printing.

Pellet Compression Process

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PelletCompressionProcess
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
compressed pellet

Compression of graphene film into pellet to improve conductivity.

Phosphoric Acid Doping

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PhosphoricAcidDoping
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
doped with phosphoric acid; acid doped; PA-doped PBI membrane

Doping of electrodes/membrane with phosphoric acid (2 M electrode doping; membrane doped in ~11 M H3PO4).

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PhotolithographyPatterning
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel

UV lithography process applied to QD photoresists for micropatterns.

Manufacturing
altLabel

Manufacturing

Process for surface modification/patterning of PEM using plasma etching (used to increase roughness / interfacial area).

Manufacturing

Manufacturing
altLabel

Manufacturing
altLabel

Pre-carbonization step at 450°C under N2 prior to annealing.

Manufacturing

Manufacturing

Manufacturing

Manufacturing

Manufacturing

Manufacturing

Manufacturing

Manufacturing

Manufacturing

Manufacturing

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SlotDieCoating

Manufacturing

Manufacturing
altLabel

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SolidStateLigandExchange

Manufacturing

Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
solution method; ink preparation; slurry preparation

Ink method where PBI remains dissolved in DMAc; compared against colloidal method.

Manufacturing

Tuning solvent polarity/volatility/composition to improve ink stability and film quality.

Manufacturing

rotavapor evaporation; solvent evaporation

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SolventEvaporationThickening

Manufacturing

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SolventFreeShearingGraphitizationProcess
Type
Manufacturing

Overall synthesis route: shear mixing biomass + FeCl3 followed by pre-carbonization and high-T annealing under N2, then acid etching and washing.

Manufacturing

Robotic spray deposition of ink in multiple passes onto heated substrate to evaporate solvent between passes.

Manufacturing
altLabel

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SteamActivationProcess

Manufacturing

High-temperature activation under steam/water vapor to create hierarchical pore structure and Fe3O4 nanoparticles.

Manufacturing
altLabel
autoclave steam; steaming

Steaming MEA/CCM prior to operation to hydrate membrane/ionomer.

Manufacturing

Manufacturing
altLabel

Thermal curing schedule applied after printing to cross-link PCS prior to pyrolysis (vacuum oven ramps/holds).

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ThermalDecompositionElectrodePreparation

Manufacturing

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ThermalOxidationOfAluminumFilm
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
calcining in air to oxidize aluminum

Heat treatment in air to convert deposited aluminum film to alumina buffer layer.

Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
TiCl4 treatment

Surface treatment of TiO2 films in TiCl4 solution (40 mM) at 70°C for 30 min (twice).

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#UltrasonicDepositionProcess
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
ultrasonic deposition; ultrasonically deposited

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#UVAssistedDirectInkWriting
Type
Manufacturing

DIW process augmented with in-situ UV irradiation to cure extruded filaments and retain shape; treated as a specialized form of DirectInkWriting.

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#UVCuringProcess
Type
Manufacturing
altLabel
UV curing

Free-radical polymerization of acrylate/methacrylate groups under UV irradiation forming crosslinked network.

Manufacturing
altLabel
dried under vacuum; vacuum-dried; VD

Drying catalyst layers on decal films under vacuum (contrasted with atmospheric drying).

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#VacuumEncapsulationProcess

Manufacturing
altLabel
vacuum-encapsulated

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#VacuumFiltrationProcess

Manufacturing

Manufacturing

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#WetCoImpregnation

Data

Data

Data

Data

Data

Data

Data

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ECSADataset

Data

Data

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ElectricalPropertiesTable

Data

Data

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ExternalQuantumEfficiencyDataset

Data

altLabel
high-speed video frames

Dataset of recorded high-speed video frames during printing.

Impedance Dataset

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ImpedanceDataset
Type
Data
altLabel
EIS spectra dataset; H2/N2 impedance spectra; impedance spectra

A dataset containing impedance data generated by Electrochemical Impedance Spectroscopy Potentiostatic, Electrochemical Impedance Spectroscopy Galvanostatic, and Proton Conductivity Measurement.

Ionomer Dispersion Property Dataset

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#IonomerDispersionPropertyDataset
Type
Data
altLabel
Table 1 dataset; ionomer dispersion table

A dataset containing ionomer dispersion property data generated by Ionomer Dispersion Property Compilation.

JV Performance Dataset

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#JVPerformanceDataset
Type
Data

Dataset of current density versus voltage under illumination.

Limiting Current Dataset

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#LimitingCurrentDataset
Type
Data
altLabel
limiting current data; transport resistance data; Figure S7 limiting current

Limiting current values and derived O2 transport resistances vs pressure and O2 concentration.

Local Oxygen Transport Resistance Dataset

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#LocalOxygenTransportResistanceDataset
Type
Data
altLabel
compiled datasets; oxygen transport resistance components dataset

A dataset containing local oxygen transport resistance data generated by Oxygen Gain/Loss Measurement and Limiting Current Measurement.

Data
altLabel
LSTM

Data

Data

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ORRPerformanceDataset

Data

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#OxygenConcentrationTimeSeriesData
Type
Data
altLabel
oxygen concentration vs time

A data resource used to represent oxygen concentration time series data generated by In Plane Effective Diffusivity Measurement.

Photodegradation Dataset

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PhotodegradationDataset
Type
Data
altLabel
photodegradation data

Dataset containing RhB concentration/degradation vs irradiation time and kinetic analysis.

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PhysicalPropertiesTable2
Type
Data

A data resource used to represent physical properties table 2.

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PolarizationCurveDataset
Type
Data
altLabel
I-V curve dataset; polarization curve data; IV curve data

Polarization curves (U-I / I-V) measured at different RH and degradation states.

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PoreSizeDistributionDataset
Type
Data
altLabel
pore size distribution; cumulative pore volume distribution; pore size distribution curves

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PorousCeramicPropertyDataset

Data

Metadata

mg_Pt

Data

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#RheologyDataset

Data

rheology results; rheology data

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SampleMass
Type
Metadata
altLabel
sample weight; coating mass; deposited mass

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SEMImageDataset
Type
Data
altLabel
SEM images; SEM surface images; FIB-SEM images

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SEMMicrographDataset
Type
Data
altLabel
SEM micrographs

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SolventPhysicalPropertyDataset
Type
Data
altLabel
Table 2 dataset; solvent property table; Table 1 dataset

A dataset containing solvent physical property data generated by Rheology Measurement, Solvent Physical Property Compilation, and Solvent Property Lookup.

Surface Topography Dataset

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SurfaceTopographyDataset
Type
Data

Processed 3D surface topography (height map) reconstructed from profilometry or microscopy data.

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#SwellingDataset
Type
Data
altLabel

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ThermalAnalysisDataset
Type
Data

Dataset of DSC and TG curves during thermal treatment.

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#XPSDataset

Data
altLabel
XPS spectra; XPS elemental composition tables; XPS elemental composition

XRD Pattern Dataset

https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#XRDPatternDataset
Type
Data
altLabel
XRD patterns; XRD pattern

Normalization Bases

6 terms

Catalyst Layer Volume

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CatalystLayerVolume
Type
NormalizationBasis

A normalization basis corresponding to catalyst layer volume and used as the reference basis for reporting quantitative results or properties.

Catalyst Mass

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#CatalystMass
Type
NormalizationBasis
altLabel
Pt mass; catalyst mass (excluding ionomer); total catalyst mass

A normalization basis corresponding to catalyst mass and used as the reference basis for reporting quantitative results or properties.

ECSA Basis

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#ECSABasis
Type
NormalizationBasis
altLabel
Pt surface area basis; cm2_Pt

A normalization basis corresponding to ECSA basis and used as the reference basis for reporting quantitative results or properties.

Geometric Area

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#GeometricArea
Type
NormalizationBasis
altLabel
active area (geometric); printed area; active area

A normalization basis corresponding to geometric area and used as the reference basis for reporting quantitative results or properties.

Ionomer Mass

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#IonomerMass
Type
NormalizationBasis
altLabel
electrolyte mass; Nafion mass (per area); Nafion mass loading

A normalization basis corresponding to ionomer mass and used as the reference basis for reporting quantitative results or properties.

Pt Mass

IRI
https://w3id.org/h2kg/hydrogen-ontology#PtMass
Type
NormalizationBasis
altLabel
mg_Pt; platinum mass; gPt

A normalization basis corresponding to pt mass and used as the reference basis for reporting quantitative results or properties.
